name: Alcatel F860 Duo ATL1423525 Twin Cordless Phone with Call Block – Black
description:
Description

About Alcatel
Your everyday life well-being is at the heart of our concerns.
From the corded to the cordless phone, from the state-of-the-heart product designed to fit in the utmost contemporary interior to the comfort phone conceived to meet elderly needs, you will find necessarily the telephone which suits you best.

Alcatel F860 Duo
Cordless DECT phone with additional handset and its own charging cradle, for people looking for an easy-to-use device.

Call-Block Function:
Enjoy peace of mind, thanks to an efficient Call-Block function with two modes:
A manual mode to block up to 100 numbers during or after a call, and an automatic mode which blocks all calls except those from your stored or VIP numbers.

So Easy to Share Conversations
Thanks to the one-touch Hands-free speakerphone, you can share your conversations while maintaining your freedom of movement.

High Quality Display
The easy-to-read, large display provides clear contrasts and a bright, pale blue backlight. Large letters and numbers ensure good legibility of names and phone numbers, and facilitate the use of the menu.

Caller ID
Thanks to Caller ID, you can see who is calling and even the call waiting. The phone displays the name and the number of the caller. To check the last incoming calls, the phone stores the 50 last calls with date and duration.

One Phonebook for All
Don't waste time storing your favourite numbers multiple times!
Create your phone numbers only once and share them with the other handsets.
The synchronised phonebook has a capacity of 100 names and numbers

Unmatched Comfort of Home Telephony
With your DECT phone, enjoy interference free, long-lasting calls with reliable sound quality without risking network failure thanks to long-range technology.

Particularly Easy Installation
All you need for the additional handset is a power socket and you can place your handset on the bedside table or in the kitchen, for example.
Calls can be forwarded from one handset to the other, and you can even make three-way calls with one external and two internal callers.

Energy Saving
Thanks to ECO MODE, the handset no longer charges continuously, but only when needed to reduce your power consumption and ensure a longer battery life. During communication, ECO MODE reduces the transmitting power according to the distance from the base station.

Environmental Impact
Our phones are made of 89% of recycled plastics.
Our packaging is made of 81% of recycled materials. It is mono-material (100% cardboard) and printed with mineral-oil-free inks for better recycling.
short_description:
Features:
• Smart Block function to block up to 100 nuisance numbers with a dedicated key and an automatic mode to block all except calls from the phonebook
• Easy to install and ready for use after initial battery charge.
• Directory for 100 names and numbers, automatically shared between handsets and two direct memory keys (M1 and M2) for the favourite contacts.
• Easy-to-read display with backlight, showing name and number, redial of any of the last 10 calls made.
• Hands-free speakerphone with adjustable volume to share conversations and to maintain freedom of movement when making calls.
• VOIP Technology
• Digital Ready

name: Alecto A003353  BC-100 Sleep trainer, night light and alarm clock - white
description:
Description

A sleep trainer which teaches you child day and night. 
Sometimes children find it difficult to judge when it is day and when it is night. They wake up and think it's time to get up when they should be in bed for a few more hours. This problem often becomes worse as the days get longer and shorter or when summer and winter time begin.

The BC-100 is a sleep trainer that helps children develop a sense of time.

How exactly does the sleep trainer work?
As a mum or dad, you set the sleep trainer to a time that you find suitable for getting up. You put the sleep trainer in your child's bedroom in a place where he or she can see it well. The display has a blue colour at night and shows a moon, this is a sign for your child to stay in bed. Has the time you set been reached? Then the display changes to an orange screen in which a sun can be seen. Time to get up! This way you can train any child, even if they can't tell the time, to stay in bed longer ensuring a better night’s sleep for you.  

The sleep trainer is wireless and rechargeable. We supply a micro-USB cable for easy charging. The brightness of the screen can be adjusted in 7 positions. You can also use it as a night light.

The BC-100 can also be used as an alarm clock, with alarm.

We will briefly outline the versatile possibilities of the BC-100 sleep trainer.
• Helps children gain a sense of time
• Can also be used as a clock with alarm clock
• Moon in the picture / blue screen: it is time to sleep
• Sun in the picture / orange screen: it is time to get up
• Wireless and rechargeable


A sleep trainer you can rely on
The BC-100 sleep trainer is a product of the Alecto Baby Care Range. Many young parents rely on our products to make their daily life easier whilst providing better ways to take care of their child. 

By choosing Alecto, you purchase a well thought-out and high-quality, user-friendly product.

What's in the box?
• BC-100 Sleep trainer
• Micro USB cable
• Manual NL / EN / DE / FR
• Universal manual
short_description:
Features:

• Sleep trainer, helps children gain a sense of time
• Can also be used as a clock with alarm clock
• Moon in the picture / blue screen: it is time to sleep
• Sun in the picture / orange screen: it is time to get up
• Colour intensity of the night light is adjustable (7 levels)
• Wireless and rechargeable (via included micro-USB cable) 
• Easy to use

name: Alecto A003374  BC-27 Infrared Ear Thermometer
description:
Description

Infrared ear-thermometer with reliable results
• Alecto Baby BC-27 Infrared ear-thermometer
• Accurate infrared temperature measurement in the ear
• Measurement result within two seconds
• Brightly lit digital display
• The last 10 measurements are automatically saved
• Including handy storage box
• Simple and easy functioning
• Battery operated (included)
• 

An accurate measurement is done in no time
A fever or a temperature elevation sometimes occurs in children. An increase in body temperature is a sign that something is going on physically. Often it is due to a cold, the flu, or certain bacteria that your child's body has yet to get used to. As harmless as it often seems, it is very important to know how high the increase, this way we can evaluate how to fight the fever. Is it a matter of just going to bed early or is it better to call the doctor?

Automatically saves the last 10 measurements
An ear measurement is one of the best ways to measure the temperature. With today's technology, the measurement is quick, easy, and reliable. This reliable infrared ear-thermometer provides an accurate measurement result within 2 seconds. Thanks to a bright blue backlit display, it takes no effort to read the temperature. The last 10 temperature measurement readings are automatically saved. For example, after a few measurements it becomes clear whether the fever is decreasing or increasing.

Includes storage box
The reliable infrared ear-thermometer is easy to use and more comfortable for your child than most other measuring methods. The chance of transmitting germs or bacteria is minimal because the measurement is taken via the ear. The handy storage box (included) means you can take this reliable infrared ear-thermometer with you while keeping it safe and protected during traveling.

Always consult your doctor with an extremely high fever (above 40.5 °C) or if the fever lasts for a long period of time.

What's in the box?
• Thermometer
• Storage box
• Button cell battery CR2032
• Manual EN / NL / DE / FR / IT / ES
short_description:
Features:
• Alecto Baby BC-27 Infrared ear-thermometer
• Accurate infrared temperature measurement in the ear
• Measurement result within two seconds
• Brightly lit digital display
• The last 10 measurements are automatically saved
• Including handy storage box
• Simple and easy functioning
• Battery operated (included)

name: Alecto A003465 - DBX-85 Full Eco DECT Baby Monitor (2 x Plug Adapters) | White/Blue
description:
Description

DBX-85 ECO: Just a great baby monitor for the best price:
If you are looking for a reliable and highly effective baby monitor! If you want a safe and secure way to hear you baby! If you want a device without any unnecessary additions! If you want a baby monitor that is easy to use and offers a great quality! All of this you will find in the Alecto Baby DBX-85GS.

What makes the Alecto Baby DBX-85 a good baby monitor?
The DBX-85 ECO is loved by many parents because it is no nonsense and easy to use. By connecting the Baby unit to the power-socket and charging the parent unit, ensuring the parent unit is charged or on the charging cradle, you are always connected.

The DBX-85 ECO offers everything you can expect from a good baby monitor:

Excellent price/quality

• Adjustable sensitivity (VOX)
• Excellent sound quality
• Docking station for rechargeable parent unit
• Talk-back function

More specifications of the DBX-85:
The DBX-85 belongs to the ECO-range. This means the radiation from this baby monitor is very low. There is no need to keep charging the Parent unit as there is a long battery life. The unit can be used for 24 hours, with just one single charge. If you move the monitor to the bedroom, you can always be the first to hear your baby when it makes a noise. If the battery is low, you will receive a warning. This way you are always reassured that the baby monitor is operating perfectly and you will have enough time to charge the parent unit. As this is a DECT baby monitor this enables a crystal clear and interference free signal with a range up to 300 metres.

You can have a connection all the time, or use the sound notification, this way the baby monitor only operates once your baby makes some noises. The unit is fully adjustable and you can change the sensitivity. With the talk-back function it is possible to soothe your baby with your own voice.

With Alecto baby you are choosing well designed products of the highest quality.

Whats in the box?
• Baby unit
• Parent unit
• Charging cradle for the parent unit
• Belt clip
• Adapter 2x
• Rechargeable batteries (2x AAA)
• Manual NL / EN / DE / FR
short_description:
Features:
• Long range (up to 50 m indoor, up to 300 m outdoor)
• 100% Interference-free and secure connection
• Long stand-by time (up to 120 hours) due to Full Eco mode
• 2-Way communication
• Sound level lights
• Crystal clear DECT sound quality
• Use anywhere! Rechargeable parent and baby unit
• Charging docking station and batteries included
• Built-in night light
• Baby monitor automatically switches on when there is noise (VOX function)
• Adjustable sensitivity
• Out of range warning
• Low battery indication
• With belt clip
• Baby unit is adapter powered (included) and battery powered (4xAA NiMH, excluded)
• Parent unit is adapter powered (included) and rechargeable battery powered (2x AAA, included)

name: Alecto DVM-64 Video Baby Monitor with 2.4 Inch Colour Display - White
description:
Description

Easy to use Baby phone Camera (extra camera)
• Extra Camera for Alecto Baby DVM-64 Baby phone with Camera
• 100% interference free
• Colour is white/black

The DVM-64 Baby phone with Camera is supplied with 2 units (baby unit) and the 2,4” colour screen (parent unit). The DVM-64 will notify you about the activities of your little one(s). While your little one is napping, you will be perfectly aware when you are in the kitchen or garden. As a parent, you will feel completely reassured since you can see everything in real-time. The Baby phone has a 2,4” colour screen for crystal clear real-time image and sound. But what if you have more than one child? Or your child sleeps and plays in separate rooms? Wouldn’t an extra camera be the perfect solution? With the Parent unit of the DVM-64 you can monitor up to several cameras with 1 screen.
The DVM-64C is an extension camera for the standard package of the DVM-64. You can connect up to a total of 4 cameras to one screen. The image can be rotated every second, so you can view what happens from multiple angles. 

Baby phone with camera, stunning design and high quality
Our designers understand the importance of a stylish design so you can place your parent unit in the living room. However, also the baby unit(s) should not look any less. So, we designed this baby phone with Camera as an inconspicuous and stylish device in a small case. A desirable product, with excellent quality and features:

Most important functions:
• The connection between baby unit and parent unit is 100% interference free.
• You can use the Eco-mode to save energy and battery time.
• Crystal clear image, also in the dark.
• Long range, which is up to 50 metres indoors and up to 300 metres outdoors.
• The Baby unit is equipped with a temperature gauge, so you can make sure the baby’s room is never too hot or cold.

Always a clear image of your baby with the DVM-64 baby phone with camera.
Don’t feel like reinstalling your baby phone every time your baby has a sleep-over? You can use an extra camera to prevent this. Also, very convenient if your child plays and sleeps in separate rooms. In general, parents buy the extra camera once a sibling is on the way. Isn’t it easier to monitor both your children on one screen?

We have made it easy and convenient to set the camera by hand in your baby room, giving you peace of mind.

With this baby phone with camera from Alecto you are purchasing a high-quality device, at an attractive price.

What’s in the box?
• Baby unit
• Parent unit
• Adapter 2x
• Mounting material
• Manual NL / EN / DE / FR / ES / IT / PL

name: Alecto DBX120 Full Eco DECT Baby Monitor - White/Blue
description:
Description

Full Eco DECT baby monitor, always perfect sound quality
• Alecto Baby DBX120 Full Eco DECT baby monitor
• Energy saving Full Eco mode
• Crystal clear DECT sound quality
• Colour: White/Blue

It is always wonderful to know your baby is sleeping safely. With this full Eco DECT baby monitor you can be assured this is the case. You can hear all the sounds your little baby is making, the wonderful sounds of waking and sleeping and the conversation with their teddy bear. Thanks to the crystal-clear sound quality and interference free connection you will never miss a moment. The DBX120 full eco DECT baby monitor is packed with features and has an energy saving ECO mode, this saves on battery time and reduces radiation since the baby monitor will only transmit once there is sound. DECT means: Digital Enhanced Cordless Telecommunication The standard in Europe, Asia, America and Australia, with the following characteristics:
• Superior sound quality.
• Secure and interference free connection
• Secured against other signals, such as a neighbour’s baby monitor or other equipment


The comfort of a Full Eco DECT baby monitor
Like all Baby Care products from Alecto, the DBX120 full eco DECT will help monitor your baby in order to provide the best of care. Among others because:
• The talk-back function allows you to calm you baby with your own voice.
• Five pre-programed lullabies to gently soothe your baby to sleep.
• A nightlight that you can operate from the parent unit.
• Temperature gauge to monitor the room temperature of the baby room.


Full Eco DECT baby monitor: other specification:
• The parent unit has a battery life up to 10 hours (20% reception / 80% standby)
• Battery low warning.
• Range up to 50 metres indoors, and 300 metres outdoors.
• Adjustable microphone sensitivity, also for the voice/talkback setting
• Sound intensity led indication, so you do not have to put the baby monitor on full volume all the time.

With this Full Eco DECT baby monitor from Alecto baby you will buy a quality product of the highest standard for an attractive price

name: Alecto A004696 - BC-100TIGER Sleep trainer, night light and alarm clock - Tiger
description:
Description

A sleep trainer which teaches you child day and night. 
Sometimes children find it difficult to judge when it is day and when it is night. They wake up and think it's time to get up when they should be in bed for a few more hours. This problem often becomes worse as the days get longer and shorter or when summer and winter time begin.

The BC-100TIGER is a sleep trainer that helps children develop a sense of time.

How exactly does the sleep trainer work?
As a mum or dad, you set the sleep trainer to a time that you find suitable for getting up. You put the sleep trainer in your child's bedroom in a place where he or she can see it well. The display has a blue colour at night and shows a moon, this is a sign for your child to stay in bed. Has the time you set been reached? Then the display changes to an orange screen in which a sun can be seen. Time to get up! This way you can train any child, even if they can't tell the time, to stay in bed longer ensuring a better night’s sleep for you.  

The sleep trainer is wireless and rechargeable. We supply a micro-USB cable for easy charging. The brightness of the screen can be adjusted in 7 positions. You can also use it as a night light.

The BC-100TIGER can also be used as an alarm clock, with alarm.

We will briefly outline the versatile possibilities of the BC-100TIGER sleep trainer.
• Helps children gain a sense of time
• Can also be used as a clock with alarm clock
• Moon in the picture / blue screen: it is time to sleep
• Sun in the picture / orange screen: it is time to get up
• Wireless and rechargeable


A sleep trainer you can rely on
The BC-100TIGER sleep trainer is a product of the Alecto Baby Care Range. Many young parents rely on our products to make their daily life easier whilst providing better ways to take care of their child. 

By choosing Alecto, you purchase a well thought-out and high-quality, user-friendly product.

What's in the box?
• BC-100TIGER Sleep trainer
• Micro USB cable
• Manual NL / EN / DE / FR
• Universal manual

name: Alecto BF55 Electric Steam Steriliser with Drying Function
description:
Description

Make it easy for you
The Alecto BF55 Electric steam steriliser and dryer makes life a whole lot easier for new parents! No more hassle with cleaning bottles, because this steam steriliser kills 99.9% of all bacteria in 12 minutes. Parents of a whole team? Even that is no problem, because the Alecto BF55 cleans up to 11 baby bottles including accessories at the same time.

Practical steam steriliser
The electric steam steriliser is suitable for parents of children with a big appetite: the cleaner sterilises even the largest bottles of 330 millilitres and is suitable for baby bottles with a stand and a wide neck. Yet this enormous capacity is not at the expense of the design. The steam cleaner has a convenient 3-in-1 modular design and is adjustable in size. Did you forget you had the steam steriliser on? No problem. Once the program is completed, the system will automatically turn off.

What else can the BF55 do?
The steam steriliser contains three programs: sterilisation, drying and sterilisation followed by drying. It cleans baby bottles, pacifiers, spoons, breast pumps and accessories. It also offers 24 hours of sterile storage after the sterilisation and/or drying program. Additionally, the product is completely BPA free and easy to use and clean. The Alecto BF55 Electric steam steriliser and dryer includes a measuring cup and pliers, perfect for a brand new parent!

Alecto offers you a well thought-out and user-friendly product of high quality.

Specifications:
• Dimensions (H x W x D) 360 x 305 x 170 mm / 14.2 x 12 x 6.7 inches
• Power supply: 230V / 50Hz


What is in the box?
• BF33 Electric steam steriliser and dryer
• Measuring cup
• Pliers
• Manual NL / EN / DE / FR / ES / IT

name: Alecto BC-70 Digital Baby Scale, Personal Scale and Pet Scale in one - Up to 150 kg with Removable Weighing Surface - White
description:
Description

With the Alecto BC70 from Alecto’s PRO collection, you’re bringing a versatile and highly accurate digital scale into your home. It’s perfect for monitoring your baby’s growth, and equally suitable for children, adults and even pets. The scale features a removable weighing surface, allowing you to use it effortlessly as both a baby scale and a personal scale with a capacity of up to 150 kg. The integrated growth meter on the tray allows you to measure your child’s length up to 70 cm, so you can keep track of both weight and height. The BC70 also ensures fast and reliable readings, accurate to within 5 grams. In addition, its sleek, compact design and smart features such as the tare and hold functions make this scale an essential tool for any parent.


Accurate Readings and Smart Features

Whether you’re weighing your newborn, toddler or yourself, the Alecto BC70 makes it quick, safe and precise. The scale includes a tare function, so you can weigh your child using a cloth, blanket or basket without affecting the measurement. This allows you to weigh your baby comfortably, without them getting cold. The hold function temporarily freezes the weight on the display, making it easier to read even when your baby is moving. The large display is clear and easy to read, giving you instant insight into your baby’s weight — accurate to within 5 grams. You can also easily switch between units: grams, kilograms, ounces (oz) and pounds (lb).


Suitable for the Whole Family

This scale is designed with versatility in mind. The removable weighing surface allows you to use the digital scale as a standard personal scale with a capacity of up to 150 kg. This makes it suitable not only for babies, but also for children, adults and pets.


Growth Meter on the Tray (up to 70 cm)

Every centimetre counts during the early months. The growth meter on the tray allows you to monitor not only your baby’s weight, but also their length — in both centimetres (up to 70 cm) and inches (up to 27 inches). No need for constant visits to the clinic or a specialist: simply track each growth spurt from the comfort of your own home, whenever it suits you.


Safety First at Every Measurement

When weighing your baby, safety naturally comes first. The BC70 is equipped with soft, raised edges that help prevent your baby from rolling or sliding off during use. At the same time, the anti-slip feet provide a stable base on any surface. That means safe weighing — and peace of mind — every time.


Easy to Use, Compact in Size

The BC70 is ready to use straight out of the box, thanks to the three included AAA batteries. Finished weighing or measuring? You can store the scale in seconds. The tray consists of two parts that simply slide in and out of each other. First click the parts together, place the tray onto the base and twist the locking tabs to secure everything in place. This creates a compact form: 70 x 30 cm with tray, and just 31 x 28.5 cm without it. Disassembly is just as easy: twist the locking tabs back and slide the parts apart again. The scale fits neatly into any cupboard or drawer, without taking up unnecessary space.


Why is the Alecto BC70 Digital Scale so Convenient? Here’s What Makes It Special:

• Digital scale with length measurement
• Ideal for monitoring your baby’s weight and length
• Also suitable for toddlers, adults and pets thanks to the removable weighing surface (up to 150 kg)
• Fast and reliable measurement
• Very easy to store because of the removable tray
• Growth meter on the tray (up to 70 cm)
• 5-gram measurement accuracy
• Tare function for weighing with a cloth or blanket
• Large, easy-to-read display
• Hold function for stable readings
• Comfortable edges help prevent rolling
• Easy switching between units (g, kg, oz, lb)

Technical Specifications:
• Battery-operated (3x AAA, included)
• Dimensions with tray/weighing surface (h x w x d): 6 x 70 x 30 cm
• Dimensions without tray/weighing surface (h x w x d): 3 x 28.5 x 31 cm


What's in the Box?

• Scale
• Removable weighing surface
• Batteries (3x AAA)
• Quick Start Guide

With the Alecto BC70, you’re choosing a practical, reliable and multifunctional scale of outstanding quality – at an excellent price. All Alecto products come with a 24-month warranty.
short_description:
Features:
• Digital scale with length measurement: ideal for monitoring your baby’s weight and length
• Fast and reliable measurement
• Tare function for weighing with a cloth or blanket
• Hold function for stable readings

name: Amplicomms ATL1423440 BigTel 1500 Cordless Big Button Phone for Elderly Solo | Black
description:
Description

More and more people today suffer from a deterioration of their hearing, sometimes starting at a young age.
With almost 15 years of experience, amplicomms is accompanying this development with a wide range of quality products adapted to different hearing needs.
Our expertise allows us to offer you products with loud yet clear sound for effortless phone calls.

Amplified Audio with Unique Sound
Ideal for people with hearing impairment and for all users looking for a phone with amplified sound.
The ringtones can be set up to 90 dB so you never miss a call.
The volume can be set to five different levels, both for the earpiece and in hands-free mode, to suit the user's hearing ability.
The audio boost button (+10dB) can also be used during the call.

Extra Audio Boost Key
Thanks to the audio boost key, ideally placed on the side of the handset, you can increase the volume during a call without having to put the handset down to adjust the volume.
Practical especially in noisy environments: The maximum amplification is +35 dB.

Best Phone for Hard of Hearing - This home telephone has an adjustable ringer volume that can be increased up to 90 db. This is louder than a power lawnmower! The phone also includes a visual ring indicator, making incoming calls even harder to miss!

Direct Memory Buttons - The BigTel1500 home telephone included 3 simple to use direct memory buttons. This allows elderly relatives or friends to simply call their nearest and dearest at the click of a button.

Big Buttons - Memory buttons and dialling keys are all extra-large allowing them to be easily seen. Ideal for the visually impaired or the unsteady hands of any older relatives of friends in need of a bit of extra help.

Increased Audio Volume - When on a call the audio can be increased by 35dB. making conversations easier to hear and follow! The phone also has a built in hands free function.

Large Character Display - The large character backlit display allows incoming calls to be easily seen. Combined with the extra-large buttons, making a call is also easier than ever for the hard of sight.

Call Blocking - Block unwanted call with the dedicated call blocker button. Block up to 100 numbers so you never have to receive unwanted calls again.
short_description:
Features:
• Audio boost +35 dB
• One-touch Audio Boost on the Handset Side:
You can also increase the volume during a call. This means that even hearing-impaired people can make calls effortlessly.
• The BigTel 1500 has Optimised Acoustics for Extra Clear Sound Quality.
• The handset is compatible with hearing aids.
• Extra Loud Ringer Volume Adjustable up to 90 dB
So, you’ll never miss a call again.
The phone also has a visual ringer indicator, so you never miss an incoming call again!
• Call Block Function to Avoid Unwanted Calls
Two Modes: manual mode to easily block numbers during or after calls and automatic mode to let only stored or VIP numbers ring.
• Three Direct Memory Keys on the Handset
Call your favourite contacts with just one click.
• Phone book with 100 names and numbers.
• Large display with backlight and large digits and letters,
to avoid mistakes when dialling and to recognise the caller’s name.  
The high-contrast keypad with large buttons makes dialling easy.
• Hands-Free Function with Adjustable Volume:
This gives you more freedom of movement when making calls.
• Digital Network Ready

name: Amplicomms ATL1424102 BigTel 50 Alarm Plus | Black
description:
Description

Enjoy your Conversations
Enjoy your Phone Calls

Thanks to unique sound performance and optional very high handset volume, telephone calls with the amplicomms BigTel 50 Plus are a pleasure.
Ideal for people with moderate to severe hearing loss: for even louder conversations, increase the handset volume by +40 dB during a call with the audio boost button.
The ringtones can be set to up to 90 dB, and thanks to the extra-large, brightly lit call display, the likelihood of you missing a call is low.

For even more safety: With separate alarm transmitter, conveniently wearable as a bracelet or pendant!


Benefits of the BigTel 50 Plus
The Amplicomms BigTel 50 Big Button Corded Telephone with Alarm Bracelet is designed especially for those with hearing, vision and memory issues. The result is an incredibly easy-to-use telephone. It sets itself apart with features like:
• Extra-Loud Receiver: Hear calls clearer and louder than ever before with an adjustable volume that goes up to 40dB (4x louder than a regular phone!)
• Extra-Loud Ringer: The ringer is similarly extremely loud, with an adjustable volume that goes up to a massive 90dB
• Emergency Call Unit: This phone includes an emergency call unit which can be set to call either a set person or emergency services when the button is pressed
• Hearing Aid Compatibility: Connect seamlessly to your hearing aid - compatible with majority of popular hearing aids on the market 
• Large Easy-Read Display: A large, bright screen displays names and numbers, as well as the time and date
• Extra Large Buttons: Dialling couldn't be easier with extra-large buttons, made specifically for the vision-impaired or those with limited motor function
• One-Touch Speed Dial: Three buttons at the top of the keypad are dedicated to providing one-touch speed dial to your most used contacts


Volume & Tone Control
A simple wheel under the handset allows you to adjust the handset volume. And three buttons on the side control you:
• Ringer volume: low / medium / high
• Tone control: When the boost function is activated, you can select your preferred sound quality in terms of bass and treble reproduction



Extra Large, Extra Loud
The amplicomms 50 Alarm Plus has two direct memory keys, an SOS key, a large, easily accessible, illuminated audio boost key and an equally large handsfree key on the phone.
For a higher call volume, even during a call, you can press the audio boost button to increase the handset volume by +40 dB. The ringtones can be set up to 90 dB.
And thanks to the extra-large, bright call light, the chances of you missing a call are low.


SOS Alarm Transmitter
As soon as the SOS button is pressed, the BigTel 50 Alarm Plus calls up to 32 pre-selected telephone numbers in succession.
A preset or personalised voice message is played. Afterwards, the hands-free mode of the telephone is automatically activated for a three-minute call.
The alarm transmitter must be within a 30-metre radius of the telephone for this, and it can be worn as a bracelet or simply as a pendant.


One-Touch Alarm Bracelet
How does it work? The SOS bracelet as well as the SOS button on the phone, is activated by a long press on the large SOS key, to automatically call up to 32 numbers you have previously selected in the phonebook.
Once the SOS key is pressed by the senior, numbers are dialled successively to alert a helper for assistance until one of them answer the call.
Standard or personalized alert voice message is played to inform the helper, then the hands-free mode of the phone is automatically activated for a three-minute conversation with the helper.
It's really reassuring to know there is a solution in case of urgent need! Nice to know: the alarm unit can be worn as a bracelet or a pendant (both systems included). The emergency bracelet must be in a 30m range of the telephone.


How Loud Is This Phone?
The BigTel 50 is an ideal telephone for anybody suffering with hearing difficulties thanks to the highly adjustable volume of both the receiver and the ringer. The extra-loud receiver can amplify the speech of your callers up to 40dB, or over 4x louder than a standard phone! The ringer is also extra-loud, and can be adjusted up to a massive maximum volume of 90dB.

Boost Button for Instant Receiver Volume Increase
This BigTel 50 Plus Landline Phone has a convenient boost button (see picture below). When pressed it boosts the receiver volume to 40dB instantly.

Can I Connect This Phone to My Hearing Aid?
Yes, this telephone is hearing aid compatible with the majority of popular hearing aids on the market. This provides crystal clear sound directly into your ears, ensuring you don't miss a thing.

• High quality sound
• Audio-boost with dedicated key and equalizer for extra loud and clear handset volume (+40dB)
• Powerful ringers (up to 90dB)

description:
Description
New Moka Induction 4tz is a fantastic, elegant and solid model made by the coffee maker market leader - Bialetti. Its unique feature is the body made of steel and aluminium, which makes it suitable for all types of hobs, including induction. The new version is refreshed in terms of the design, has got a thicker wall of the boiler and offers new colourways.

Moka Induction 4tz is used to brew 2 cups of espresso at a time (approx. 50ml each). The total capacity is 200ml.

To brew true Italian espresso, you just need this coffee pot, good coffee and a few minutes!

• Design:
Moka Induction is the elegant combination of a classic coffee pot with an extravagant design. Choosing this coffee pot, you chose a great tool for making coffee with unique aesthetics. The knob and additional handle made of black silicone provide comfortable handling and serving when your coffee is ready. The top tank of the coffee pot is aluminium and the bottom tank is made of steel.

• Use:
Bialetti Moka Induction is suitable for gas, electric and induction hobs. Put the product on the hob so that the handle is beyond the reach of heat.

Wash your coffee pot by hand, without any detergents. Not dishwasher safe.

Choosing the size of your coffee maker, keep in mind that every time you need to prepare the quantity of coffee specified by the manufacturer.

• How does moka work?
The coffee maker consists of a top sealed tank, a filter and a bottom tank. Put ground coffee beans in the filter, pour water into the bottom tank below the safety valve level and connect all the elements. Put the coffee pot on the stove and wait a few minutes. Hot water moves to the top tank, flowing through the ground beans. Your delicious and aromatic espresso is ready!
short_description:
FEATURES:
• Brand: Bialetti
• Colour: Black
• Material: Aluminum and steel
• Number of espressos: 4
• Induction: yes
• Capacity: 200 ml

name: BRITA S1051129 Marella MAXTRA PRO White 2.4L - 6 cartridges
description:
Description

Our All-Rounder with the innovative BRITA filtration technology: 150 litres of fresh filtered water in 4 weeks with just one cartridge, fitting in standard fridge doors, BPA-free and dishwasher-safe (except digital indicator).

Easy one-hand filling with the flip-lid, digital Lifetime Indicator BRITA Memo measures time to remind on filter exchange. Spout cover protects your filtered water from dust and other impurities in the kitchen. With PerfectFit for optimal filtration guarantee with BRITA MAXTRA PRO filters.

Trust the innovative MAXTRA PRO 4-stage filtration with natural activated carbon and ion-exchanger pearls: pure and fresh water, full aroma in your coffee and tea and reliable limescale protection.

Filters impurities such as certain herbicides, pesticides and pharmaceuticals, reduces taste-impairing substances such as chlorine, limescale and metals like lead and copper.

Improved filter performance: BRITA's new innovative micro-mesh reduces microparticles ≥ 30 μm. 4x better than our previous BRITA MAXTRA+ filter cartridge - ideal for older pipework.

Good for you, good for the environment: helps to save hundreds of plastic bottles with a carbon footprint up to 25x less than bottled water and is always available just a tap away. Plus, we have been recycling our cartridges since 1992.

Practical and sustainable packaging: easy opening, less packaging waste and extra safety during delivery in the BRITA Smart Box.

Full capacity of 2.4L for 1.4L fresh filtered water (Cool version only). Need for even more fresh filtered water? Check out BRITA Marella XL, BRITA Style XL and BRITA Flow.

German Quality and Design - since 1966: BRITA provides sustainable drinking water solutions and is the world's No. 1 brand for drinking water filters.

Included: 1x BRITA Marella water filter jug in White, 6x MAXTRA PRO ALL-IN-1 filter cartridges which each last 150L and are recyclable.

name: Cole & Mason H321803 Regent Concrete Precision+ Salt & Pepper Mill Set 18cm
description:
Description

A stylish and contemporary salt and pepper mill set that has been inspired by urban British architecture, made from crystal clear acrylic and concrete making them a tactile and durable centre piece for any dining setting.

The concrete has been finished with a layer of clear lacquer to protect its finish and prevent marking from everyday use. The base also features a plastic worktop protector ring to prevent the concrete from coming into contact with work surfaces to avoid scratching or damaging.

Exceptional Quality
The Precision mechanism is made from hardened carbon steel that strips instead of crushing peppercorns allowing them to release their natural oils which gives you more flavour with every turn. Designed and engineered in England, the hardwearing qualities of the mechanisms ensure you will always receive a consistently outstanding performance.

Designed to release the flavour
As part of the Cole & Mason Gourmet Precision range they provide you with the confidence to enhance the flavour of any meal through seasoning as a professional would.

Adjustable Grinding Settings
To adjust the grind from fine to coarse simply tighten or loosen the knob situated at the base of the mill. Use a coarse setting for steaks or tomato salad, a medium setting for pizzas and a fine setting for soups and sauces. Once your desired grind size has been selected, hold the mill firmly at the concrete section and twist the stainless steel band at the base.

Pre-filled
The mills come partially filled with premium whole black peppercorns from Vietnam and coarse sea salt from Belgium so are ready to use from the moment you receive them.

Easy to Re-fill
When you do need to refill them simply turn the mill upside-down an unscrew the acrylic top from the concrete base. Fill up with your favourite whole peppercorns and coarse salt, replace the base and continue to enjoy freshly ground seasoning.  

Easy to Clean
Just wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry. We recommend you do not use any cleaning products as this can affect the finish of the product or immerse in water, or place in a dishwasher.

Lifetime Mechanism Guarantee
All Cole & Mason mills are covered by the lifetime mechanism guarantee giving you the confidence to season like a professional for years to come.

Looking After your Mills
If your mill becomes difficult to grind, particularly on a fine setting, trying clearing the mechanism. Turn the mill upside down, loosen the knob to the coarsest setting and twist the top. This will free any large peppercorns or salt crystals that may have become lodged. Re-tighten the knob to the desired setting.
short_description:
Features:
• A sleek and stylish salt and pepper mill set taking inspiration from modern urban British architecture. Combining acrylic and concrete for a modern and tactile table centre piece

• Featuring the Cole & Mason Precision+ mechanisms; carbon steel for pepper that strips peppercorns instead of crushing them, and diamond-sharp ceramic for salt, ensuring maximum flavour release from every turn. The hardwearing qualities of these mechanisms ensure you will always receive a consistently outstanding performance.

• The clear acrylic top contrasts well with the smooth dark grey concrete base which has been finished with a clear protective lacquer to prevent marking. The simplicity of the shape allows the minimalist qualities of the materials to stand out.

• To clean, wipe with a damp cloth and use a clean cloth to dry. We recommend you do not use any cleaning products as this can affect the finish of the product. Do not immerse in water or place in a dishwasher.

• All Cole & Mason salt and pepper mills are covered by our lifetime mechanism guarantee. Should your mill not meet the high standards and expectations of Cole & Mason products we will be happy to replace your mill for an alternative of equivalent value. Accidental breakage, poor care and damage from misuse are not covered.

name: Crosley CR704B-WA Musician 8-in-1 Record Player | Walnut
description:
Description

Give analog music an encore with the Musician 8-In-1 Record Player. This three-speed turntable system is housed in a retro-inspired cabinet and includes a cassette player, AM/FM radio, and a CD player. Since this is still a digital world, you can stream your favourite playlist using the Bluetooth function and the built-in stereo speakers. The Musician vinyl record player brings every music format to one platform, so you never miss a beat.

Versatile 8-in-1 Functionality
The Musician record player is more than just a turntable; it is an 8-in-1 audio solution that caters to all your music needs. It not only plays your cherished vinyl records but also features digital options like Bluetooth connectivity. You can easily connect your smartphone or tablet, so you can enjoy your favourite playlists from various sources. With this versatile player, you can listen to music from any format, making it a perfect fit for audiophiles and casual listeners alike.

Stylish Walnut Finish
What sets the Musician record player apart is its elegant walnut finish, adding a touch of vintage charm to any space. Not only does it look great sitting in your living room, but it also serves as a conversation starter for guests. This beautiful design combines aesthetics and functionality, ensuring that it complements any home décor style. Additionally, the quality materials promise durability, so you can cherish this piece for years to come.

Easy-to-Use Features
The Musician 8-in-1 record player is designed with user-friendliness in mind. It features intuitive controls, making it accessible for all ages. The adjustable speed settings allow you to easily switch between 33, 45, and 78 RPM for different vinyl records. Moreover, because of its built-in speakers, you can enjoy your tunes without needing additional equipment. The combination of ease and functionality ensures that everyone can enjoy their music with minimal hassle.
short_description:
Features:
• 8-In-1 MUSIC PLAYER: Includes a three-speed turntable with a cueing lever, which plays 33 1/3, 45, and 78 RPM records. The record player includes AM/FM Radio, a CD player, and a cassette player.
• BLUETOOTH RECORD PLAYER: Bluetooth connectivity lets you stream music from your mobile device through the vinyl record player's built-in speakers.
• SOUND & CONNECTION: Dynamic full-range stereo speakers with aux input, plus a headphone jack for private listening.
• CONVENIENCE: Setting up this entertainment center is easy. Ready in minutes to enjoy vinyl listening with modern technology.

name: Crosley CR8017B-AM4 Voyager 2-Way Bluetooth Record Player – Amethyst
description:
Description

The Bluetooth Voyager briefcase design record player stands out because of the sleek grill at the front where the two speakers are located behind, waiting for you to turn up the volume. name: Daewoo FLR00182GE 20L Ash Vacuum Cleaner with HEPA Filter
description:
Description


Powerful Ash Removal
The Daewoo Ash Vacuum Cleaner is your ideal solution for maintaining a clean, ash-free space around fireplaces, log burners, stoves, bonfires, and BBQs. Equipped with 17KPA suction power and a 1200W motor, it quickly removes ash and debris, saving you time and effort. With its high-performance design, this vacuum is built to handle tough clean-up tasks effortlessly.

 
Extra-Large 20L Capacity
Featuring a 20-litre metal collection tank, this vacuum holds large quantities of ash, allowing you to clean multiple areas without needing frequent emptying. The durable metal tank ensures safe containment and extended use, making it a reliable choice for high-ash areas. This extra capacity means fewer interruptions, so you can get the job done efficiently.

 
Safe, Flame-Resistant Design
The Daewoo Ash Vacuum is constructed from flame-resistant materials, providing a safe cleaning solution near warm surfaces, like fireplaces and wood stoves once they've cooled. With a 2m flexible hose and 2.8m power cable, it offers extended reach for hard-to-access areas, giving you thorough cleaning capabilities.
 

Blower Function for Stubborn Ash
Equipped with a blower function, this ash vacuum makes it easy to loosen stubborn, hard-to-reach ash. The blower is perfect for dislodging debris from tight corners and gaps, allowing for a deeper clean with less manual effort. This versatile feature enhances the vacuum’s functionality, making it a complete tool for comprehensive ash management.

 
Extended Warranty for Peace of Mind
For added reliability, the Daewoo Ash Vacuum Cleaner includes a 3-year warranty (available with online registration). This extended coverage gives you peace of mind, knowing your vacuum is protected against manufacturing defects. Built for long-lasting performance, the Daewoo Ash Vacuum Cleaner is a trusted choice for ash and standard vacuuming needs around the home.
short_description:
Features:
• Vacuum ash & debris from fireplaces, log burners, stoves, bonfires, BBQs
• Extra-large 20L metal collection tank
• 1200W
• Powerful 17KPA suction power
• Flame-resistant materials - safe for use near hot surfaces
• 2m flexible hose
• 2.8m power cable
• Blow function - helps loosen stubborn ash
• Doubles up as a standard vacuum cleaner
• Extended 3-year warranty (online registration)

description:
Description

With its accessible design and large, easy-to-use keypad, Doro PhoneEasy® 311c is one of our most popular landline telephones. It’s equipped with shortcut keys, HAC (Hearing Aid Compatibility) and a flashing light for incoming calls.
short_description:

• Big buttons for easy dialling
• 3 speed dial memories
• Easily adjustable handset volume
• HAC (hearing aid compatible) 
• Loud and clear sound

name: Doro 4618 PhoneEasy 331ph Big Button Phone with 3 Picture Pre-Sets
description:
Description

Put a smile on someone's face, and on your own, by making calls with Doro PhoneEasy® 331ph. Just insert photos of the people you call most often into the one-touch keys, and you can dial them in a snap.
short_description:
Features:

• BIG BUTTONS & LOUD AND CLEAR SOUND: The PhoneEasy 331ph features large, widely spaced and concave buttons for easy dialling. Volume buttons let you easily adjust the handset volume to get a loud and clear sound.

• SPEED DIAL: The telephone has 3 one-touch photo memories which act as speed dials for most frequently used contacts. A picture or a name/symbol can be placed under the transparent cover of the speed dial buttons so that it is easier to see who you are calling.

• HEARING AID COMPATIBLE (HAC): The handset has a built-in hearing loop for those who wish to use their hearing aids while using the telephone. Select the T mode on your hearing aid to enable this feature.

• REDIAL BUTTON: If the number dialled is engaged or you wish to dial the last number called, lift the handset and press and release the redial button underneath.

• VISUAL RING INDICATOR: This home telephone features a flashing light across the top when receiving an incoming call.

name: Doro 8369 Smart Watch | Black/Green
description:
Description

Stay active and feel more secure with an elegant smartwatch that provides both motivation and peace of mind throughout every step of your active life. The Doro Watch is specially designed to be easier to read, all thanks to large icons and text shown one by one on a big, bright and sharp display. Simply swipe the display to access the functions you want – from checking the time and notifications to activity tracking and health monitoring. Get even more out of your watch with our health and activity app. Or why not pair it with a Doro smartphone (Android 10.0 and later) to use the watch's assistance button to alert relatives if you should ever need help? In addition, the Doro Watch has exceptional battery life of one full week, and comes with an easy to connect charging cradle. It also has guided instructions for quick and easy set up. So say hello to a new, stylish companion to keep you looking and feeling your best.
short_description:
Features:
• EASY INTERFACE: A visually stunning interface, focusing on one icon at a time, on a clear, bright and high contrast 1.28” display. Enter the menu using the top button and then swipe left or right to navigate the different icons and activities. The face and display has been specifically designed to be easier to read with sharp text and large icons.

• ACTIVITY TRACKER: Track your steps each day or log an activity such as running or cycling for clarity of your fitness goals and movements. You can keep a quick eye on your heart rate or blood oxygen levels at all times.

• DORO COMPANION APP: Use the Doro Companion app on your smartphone (it will work with any smartphone, Android version 10 and above or iOS) to track your activities and exercise, steps and distance travelled in more detail as well as your night’s sleep and heart rate across the day.

• NOTIFICATIONS: Set it up to get incoming call and message notifications, as well as alarms and calendar entries, directly on your watch. Note! It won’t be possible to answer calls directly from the Doro Watch.

• WATER RESISTANT: The Doro Watch can be worn all day, every day! It is IP68 rated meaning it is protected against dust and water, up to an hour at 1,5 metres. No more remembering to remove your watch to wash up or paddleboard!

• BATTERY: Charging your Doro Watch is a breeze, simply dock it in the charging cradle to top up the 300mAh battery. Fully charged in less than 2 hours, it will see your battery give you one week’s usage.

• CONNECTION WITH DORO SMARTPHONE: When connected with a Doro smartphone (android 10 and later), the watch can be easily connected to the Response by Doro app and can trigger alerts to family or friends should you need help quickly. The watch connects simply by Bluetooth and when pressed it will trigger the assistance button on your Doro smartphone remotely.

name: emporiaSMART.7lite - E7LT.v1.bk.01- Easy to Use Smart Phone for Seniors, 5.45 Inch Display | Black
description:
Description

The new Smart7 lite 4G smartphone from emporia changes the world of accessible smartphones. Fully featured and powerful performance with all the accessibility you know from Emporia and the award-winning easy-to-use interface and emporiaCOACH. NFC (supporting both payments and live blood glucose monitoring sensors), Fingerprint and face unlock, incudes the amazing smart-cover and charging cradle. 5.45" HD display, Android 15, 6GB RAM, 128GB ROM and expandable memory. The triple lens camera configuration offers crisp photos and video (13MP +2MP + TOF) 8MP selfie camera, 3600mAh battery. T4/M4 hearing aid compatible, option to use standard android interface.

The emporia 7 series is completely trimmed for security and durability: A fully equipped Android smartphone including a comprehensive security package, ongoing security patches and the proven no-panic button. The most striking thing is that the 7 Series fits well in the hand thanks to the compact 5.5-inch format.

Android 15 with Update Guarantee
In terms of software, the 7 series will launch with Android 15 and with the promise that the operating system will be updated to at least the next five Android generations. In addition, security patches are constantly carried out and the smartphone is always kept up to date with the latest security level
Thanks to NFC and fingerprint sensors, users do not have to worry about online banking or logging into the Digital Office.

No Panic Thanks to the No-Panic Button
The tried-and-tested no-panic button is also installed in the 7 series. This external, directly accessible emergency button provides safety, for example when you are alone at night. The button is designed as a favourite key and can also be assigned to other functions (e.g. voice assistant, flashlight).
The patented Smartcover, which enables the operation of important functions when closed, also promises safety.

Replace the Battery Yourself
The battery is tested for at least 1,000 charging cycles, is no longer permanently installed and can be replaced by yourself. Spare parts are guaranteed to be available for at least seven years.

Convenience: Easy to Use, Information Center, emporiaCOACH, Charging Cradle
The tried-and-tested emporia interface with large control panels and clearly structured menu navigation on board is ideal for those who simply want it simple. You can easily switch to the familiar Android mode and back again at any time.
All notifications (missed calls, WhatsApp, alerts) converge in the Action Center, so that you always have everything in view.
The free emporiaCOACH app helps digital newcomers and switchers to quickly familiarize themselves with their smartphones.
Charging cradle instead of cable clutter: Simply place the mobile phone in the shell instead of untangling the cable or looking for the plug. Ideal for bedside tables, kitchen or office.

Beautiful Photos Thanks to Triple Camera
Beautiful photos and videos can be taken with the built-in triple camera and selfie camera.
short_description:
FEATURES:

• Comfortable size with 5.45-inch touch display
• Incl. smart cover and charging cradle
• Android 15
• Physical no-panic button with favourites function (emergency call, flashlight, camera, app favourite)
• Android mode optional
• Replaceable battery with 1000 charging cycles
• NFC for unlimited connectivity
• Triple rear camera 13 + 0.3 + 2 MP
• Selfie camera 8 MP
• 6 GB RAM / 128 GB ROM

name: Emporia T221_4G_001_UK Senior Phone with voice assist
description:
Description

The Emporia TALKactive T221 4G is an elegant clamshell mobile phone specially adapted with Voice Assist to vocalize your messages and all the key functions, from menus and incoming calls announcing numbers or names from the phone book contacts to reading out SMS messages received and supporting with talking keys to create messages and even read them out before you send. Designed with simplicity in mind, this phone is ideally suited to any blind or partially sighted person who wants an easy-to-use handset with “Talking” functionality.
 
Talking features
• Whenever you press a button, the voice assist function will talk back the action of the dedicated button.
• When you receive a message, the voice assist function will read it for you once.
• If you want to listen to a message once more, you can press one of the 3 white buttons (camera / short dial) to repeat it.
• When someone is calling with an unknown number, the voice assist function will read the number. If someone is calling who is a saved contact in your phone book, the voice assistant will say the name.
• When typing a message, each key will speak the letters. To hear the message before you send it, press any of the 3 white buttons and the full typed message will be read out.
• To hear the time and battery status, when the phone is closed, press one of the side volume buttons
 
The Voice Assist Function
• The voice assist function is turned on by default.
• The voice assist function can be customised to your specific needs under 6. Settings / 1. Voice assistant.
• When you enable the voice assist function you can choose the action that should be talked back (Menu list, Message, Incoming Call, etc). Simple is the new smart.
 
Emergency Call Function (optional)
• Up to five emergency numbers dialled automatically in sequence when the emergency button is pressed
• Emergency call confirmation required by recipient (to ensure that emergency calls do not go through to a contact’s voicemail)
• The emergency button can be deactivated and covered by the 2nd battery door without button position
short_description:
FEATURES:
• Clamshell 4G mobile phone with Voice Assist.
• Key functions and text messages are read aloud.
• Extra-large illuminated buttons with a defined pressure point.
• Large screen with text that is easy to read.
• Loud and clear sound, suitable for the hard of hearing – HAC: M4 / T4.
• Emporia emergency call function (optional).

The emporiaONE has a 1.77-inch external display and a 2 MP camera. This means you can take snapshots in no time at all - whether in your own four walls or when traveling. The display also scores points with a large call display and excellent readability. And you can even make calls with this phone when it is closed. Sounds fantastic, right? Well, it is!

We also have two different battery covers for this flip phone with external display - one with and one without an emergency call button. This means you are prepared for emergencies and can quickly call for help and set the rescue chain in motion if necessary. This device is also IP54-certified, meaning it is dust and splash-proof.

All in all, you are getting a modern flip phone in your home or in your hand - with a large external display and an attractive design. Well, can you still contain your anticipation?

name: EZVIZ C3C-WIFI-2.8MM WiFi Smart Home Security Camera, 720P HD IP Bullet Camera, Local or Cloud recording, Remote App Viewing, IFTTT
description:
Description
Husky C Outdoor Security Camera
EZVIZ Husky Outdoor Security Cameras are designed to bring industrial grade surveillance cameras to your home. With one of the industry leading image quality, rugged weatherproof casing, and smart home compatibility features, the Husky camera stands guard 24/7 and in any weather condition.

Brave All the Elements
No matter rain or snow, day or night, Wi-Fi or a wired connection, the C3C is a must-have bullet camera. Ready for any conditions with an IP66 waterproof and dustproof design and outstanding night vision technology.

Designed for All Weather
With an IP66-rated weatherproof design, the C3C is a reliable and durable guard that can protect you in all types of weather.

Brilliant at Night
The C3C’s infrared lights provide illumination up to 30 meters, giving you clear-as-day vision in the dark of night.


Flexible Connectivity Options
The C3C supports a wired network connection as well as a Wi-Fi option, freeing you from the hassle of dealing with cables.
short_description:
Features:
• No more difficult cable wiring. You can deploy the C3C (HuskyC) easily and quickly anywhere with Wi-Fi, and retrieve images and live recording from your tablet and smartphone.
• Smart Home IP Camera with IFTTT capability for connecting to IoT smart devices
• View Anywhere, anytime through the EZVIZ app, which lets you see all of your EZVIZ cameras in one place. Secure and encrypted using multilayer security and end-to-end video encryption.
• Sturdy weatherproof IP66 rated construction works in extreme indoor and outdoor temperatures from -25°C to 60°C.
• 1x EZVIZ C3C Wi-Fi 1x Screw Kit 1x Power Adapter (1.5 metre) 1x Quick Start Guide 1x Mounting Template 1x Waterproof Ethernet Connector

name:
Garett ATOM Smartwatch | BLACK STEEL 
(with Additional Orange Silicone Quick Release Strap)
description:
Description

Technology in Perfect Shape
The Garett Atom is a device created for those seeking the perfect blend of functionality and modern design. This watch boasts a wide range of features that make it an indispensable everyday companion. Equipped with a large AMOLED screen, a long-lasting battery, and measurement functions, the Garett Atom offers the user comfort and reliability in one. Additionally, the set includes a stylish bracelet, an additional strap, and a bracelet length adjustment tool, allowing you to fully customize the watch to your lifestyle and needs.

AMOLED DISPLAY
Perfect Image Quality at your Fingertips
The Garett Atom features a high-quality 1.43-inch AMOLED display with a resolution of 466 x 466 pixels. This means every detail on the screen is clear and legible, regardless of lighting conditions. Whether you're in bright sunlight or dim light, the information on the screen is always easy to read. An additional advantage is the Always On Display feature, which subtly illuminates the watch face, providing both an elegant look and quick access to information like the date and time, without having to actively turn on the screen. It's the perfect solution for those who value comfort and style in one.

TWO IN ONE
Elegance and Functionality in Every Situation
The Garett Atom smartwatch was designed for users who expect both functionality and aesthetics. The watch is equipped with a stylish bracelet and an additional strap, allowing you to quickly and easily change the device's appearance depending on the occasion. The bracelet adds elegance and is perfect for formal occasions, while the strap ensures comfort during everyday use and sports activities. This makes the Garett Atom your versatile partner for everyday wear and special occasions.

POWERFUL BATTERY
A Battery that Meets your Requirements
A powerful battery is one of the key features of the Garett Atom. The watch is equipped with a 370 mAh battery, which allows for continuous operation for up to 8 days on a single charge. In standby mode, the battery lasts up to 20 days, making the Garett Atom an excellent choice for both demanding workdays and longer trips where access to a charger may be difficult. This allows you to enjoy the device's full functionality without frequent charging, further enhancing user comfort.

ACTIVITY MONITORING
Your Daily Support
The Garett Atom is equipped with advanced sensors that monitor key health parameters. The watch measures heart rate, blood oxygen levels, and blood pressure, and also functions as a pedometer, calorie counter, and sleep monitor. This allows you to track your progress and promote regeneration. Additionally, the breathing training function helps reduce stress and improve well-being. It's a comprehensive tool that supports your health every day.

SMART VOICE ASSISTANT
Your Personal Everyday Assistant
Using the Garett Atom is incredibly simple thanks to the built-in voice assistant. This feature allows you to control the watch using voice commands, making the device even more intuitive and convenient to use. Whether you want to set a reminder, check the weather, or plan your day, just a few words are enough, and the Garett Atom will take care of the rest. This is technology that makes life easier.

BLUETOOTH CONVERSATIONS
Communication Without Borders
Thanks to the Bluetooth calling feature, the Garett Atom lets you answer and make phone calls without having to reach for your smartphone. It's the perfect solution for situations when your hands are full or you need quick communication on the go. Now you can talk freely while exercising, driving, or going about your daily routine, while the smartwatch keeps you in constant contact with loved ones.

SPORT MODES
A Versatile Partner for Any Physical Activity
Whether you prefer running, cycling, or other forms of activity, the Garett Atom will adapt to your needs. The watch offers a wide range of sports modes that allow you to precisely track your activity and record data such as duration, intensity, and effectiveness of your workouts. Detailed statistics allow you to analyse your progress, plan your next workouts, and achieve even better results.

FULL COMPATIBILITY
A Connection Without Compromise
The Garett Atom is fully compatible with iOS and Android, allowing for seamless connection to your smartphone. The dedicated Garett Smart app allows you to synchronize data and personalize settings, allowing you to fully utilize the potential of your device.

ADDITIONAL ACCESSORIES
Tailored to your Needs
The set includes a bracelet length adjustment tool, allowing you to precisely adjust the bracelet to your wrist circumference. This not only makes the watch stylish but also comfortable to wear in any situation. Accessories allow you to personalize the clasp without having to visit a watchmaker, making the device even more functional and comfortable to use.

GARETT SMART APPLICATION
Everything you Need
With the Garett Smart app, you have full access to your progress. Track distance travelled, steps taken, and calories burned, monitor sleep quality, and health parameters. The app allows you to analyse collected data and set goals based on them that will help you achieve even better results. Whether you're looking to improve your fitness, health, or achieve new records, Garett Smart will be your reliable support.


FULL SPECIFICATIONS:

•	AMOLED Display 
•	1,43" Display size 
•	466 x 466 px resolution 
•	Multiple custom screen/dials. 
•	Always on Display 
•	Screen awakening by hand movement 
•	IP68 Waterproof 
•	370 mAh battery capacity 
•	Up to 20 days standby time 
•	Battery saving mode 
•	100+ Sports modes 
•	History of sports modes (app only) 
•	History of the route travelled (app only) 
•	Bluetooth 5.2 
•	Bluetooth calls 
•	Phonebook 
•	Call history 
•	Dialling keypad 
•	Phone notifications: incoming/missed calls, SMS & installed apps. 
•	Vibration notifications 
•	Do not disturb mode 
•	Pedometer 
•	Calorie counter 
•	Inactivity monitor 
•	Sleep monitor 
•	Pulse meter 
•	Pulse oximeter 
•	Blood pressure monitor 
•	Breathing training 
•	Weather information 
•	Voice assistant 
•	Phone search function 
•	Watch search function 
•	Music control on the phone 
•	Camera control on the phone 
•	Alarm clock 
•	Stopwatch 
•	Timer 
•	Calculator 
•	Dedicated app.: Garett Smart 
•	Compatibility: Android 8.0 / iOS 13.0 and later 
•	CPU: RTL8763E 
•	RAM: 578 KB 
•	ROM: 640 MB 
•	Menu in 14 languages 
•	Strap adjustment range: silicone: approx. 16,5 - 23,5 cm; steel: approx. 15,5 - 22,5 cm 
•	Smartwatch case: 47 x 47 x 14 mm 
•	Weight: silicone: approx. 65 g steel: approx. 115 g 
•	24-month Warranty 
•	Additional functions: watch lock capability, breathing rate measurement, SOS function, flashlight, arcade game, various menu styles to choose from 
•	What’s in the box: GARETT smartwatch, additional silicone strap, bracelet adjustment tool, charging cable, QSG manual

Features:
•	1.43” AMOLED Display Screen 
•	Quick Release Interchangeable Straps
•	Powerful Battery
•	Activity Monitoring
•	Smart Voice Assistant
•	Bluetooth Calling Feature
•	Sport Modes
•	Compatible with Android and IOS
•	Colour:  Black Steel with Bracelet + additional Orange Silicone Strap
•	Includes a bracelet length adjustment tool

name:
Garett COMPASS GPS Smartwatch | BLACK STEEL
(with Additional Green Silicone Quick Release Strap)
description:
Description

Garett Compass – A Reliable Outdoor Smartwatch
The Compass features an AMOLED screen protected by Gorilla Glass and a precise GPS module. It's a durable sports watch that's suitable for both city life and extreme adventures.

Two Styles, One Smartwatch
The Garett Compass GPS Black Steel comes with two quick release silicone straps, one black & one green

AMOLED Screen with Gorilla Glass Protection
The 1.43″ AMOLED display with a resolution of 466 × 466 pixels provides a clear and fluid image. The Always on Display feature allows you to constantly view information, while Gorilla Glass protects the screen from scratches and damage.

Reliable Satellite Navigation
The Garett Compass GPS Smartwatch is equipped with a precise GPS module that supports six satellite systems: GPS, GLONASS, Beidou, Galileo, NAVIC, and QZSS. Thanks to broad signal compatibility, the device ensures accurate location and stable operation even in hard-to-reach areas where other devices often lose coverage.

Reliable Operation in all Conditions
The Garett Compass GPS Smartwatch is designed to be highly resistant to extreme outdoor conditions. The device easily withstands shock, moisture, dust, and extreme temperatures, remaining a reliable companion both in everyday use and during demanding off-road expeditions.

Complete Freedom of Activity
The Garett Compass GPS is a smartwatch designed for activity in all conditions. 5 ATM water resistance allows you to use the watch while swimming, intense workouts in the rain, or hiking. Over 100 sport modes, including running, cycling, water sports, trekking, and strength training, provide comprehensive support for a variety of activities.

Easy Connections and Operation
The Garett Compass is equipped with a microphone and speaker that allow you to make calls via Bluetooth directly from your wrist. A built-in voice assistant makes it easy to control smartwatch and smartphone functions, ensuring comfort even during intense activity.

Notifications and Music at your Fingertips
The Garett Compass GPS lets you control music playback directly from your wrist, and also notifies you of incoming messages, emails, and app notifications. These features make it easy to stay connected and provide multimedia access both on a daily basis and during travel or outdoor activities.

Full Support for Health
The Garett Compass smartwatch allows you to monitor your heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation (SpO₂), providing detailed data on your body's condition. Sleep analysis and respiratory training support the recovery process and help you maintain the right balance between exercise and rest.

Works with the Garett Fit Pro app
Garett Compass works seamlessly with Android and iOS systems, using the dedicated Garett Fit Pro app. It enables secure data collection, intuitive feature management, and quick access to health statistics, training, and activity data in one place.

The Garett Compass is a smartwatch designed for activity in all conditions. 5 ATM water resistance allows you to use the watch while swimming, intense workouts in the rain, or hiking. Over 100 sport modes, including running, cycling, water sports, trekking, and strength training, provide comprehensive support for a variety of activities.

Easy Connections and Operation
The Garett Compass is equipped with a microphone and speaker that allow you to make calls via Bluetooth directly from your wrist. A built-in voice assistant makes it easy to control smartwatch and smartphone functions, ensuring comfort even during intense activity.

Notifications and Music at your Fingertips
The Garett Compass lets you control music playback directly from your wrist, and also notifies you of incoming messages, emails, and app notifications. These features make it easy to stay connected and provide multimedia access both on a daily basis and during travel or outdoor activities.

Full Support for Health
The Garett Compass smartwatch allows you to monitor your heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation (SpO₂), providing detailed data on your body's condition. Sleep analysis and respiratory training support the recovery process and help you maintain the right balance between exercise and rest.

Works with the Garett Fit Pro app
Garett Compass works seamlessly with Android and iOS systems, using the dedicated Garett Fit Pro app. It enables secure data collection, intuitive feature management, and quick access to health statistics, training, and activity data in one place.

name: Garett ESSA 4G Kids Smartwatch | Black
description:
Description

Garett Kids Essa 4G Multifunctional Watch
The Garett Kids Essa 4G children's watch features a clear 1.83" display and a screen covering most of the front panel, distinguishing this model from other watches in the Kids series. The smartwatch is equipped with the modern Android 8.1 system and WhatsApp. Another advantage is a powerful battery that lasts up to 4 days with an active SIM card. Using 4G LTE connectivity, the watch ensures constant contact between parent and child. Take advantage of voice and video calls, as well as the ability to send text messages. Furthermore, the smartwatch is equipped with a special protective frame and a Face Unlock option. Furthermore, with the Garett Kids Essa 4G, you can ensure your child's safety, as the watch features GPS location and Geofencing.

Face Unlock Function - Effective Security
The innovative Face Unlock feature, which reads the owner's facial features, prevents unauthorized access to the watch. This feature also makes it easier for your child to quickly use the device, for example, during a break from play. The Garett Kids Essa 4G is suitable for all your child's activities, as it boasts a high IP67 water resistance rating. Additionally, the smartwatch is protected by a special protective frame, so you don't have to worry about the device getting wet or dirty.

Vivid Display Colours
The Garett Kids Essa 4G features a large 1.83" display with HD resolution, ensuring comfortable reading, even in direct sunlight. Furthermore, the screen surface is very large relative to the front panel. Your child will be delighted with the ease of use and vivid colours when viewing photos, and will also appreciate the ability to change the wallpaper or menu styles. You can personalize the watch by setting your favourite wallpaper and choosing from a variety of menu styles.

Android 8.1 Operating System
Android 8.1 allows for efficient use of numerous applications. One of them is WhatsApp, which makes it easy to exchange quick messages with your child during school breaks. Furthermore, this model allows for voice and video calls, as well as sending text messages. Thanks to its large memory capacity – 1 GB RAM + 8 GB ROM – your little one has access to features like a lesson plan and a maths game. They'll also enjoy playing music on wireless headphones via Bluetooth.

Smartwatch with Safety Features and a Durable Battery
The Garett Kids Essa 4G was designed with young users in mind, so battery life is crucial. The smartwatch works for up to 4 days without charging, and importantly, with an active SIM card. This way, you can stay in touch with your little one at all times, even without their knowledge. To check their current location, use GPS location or Geofencing. This feature allows you to set a safe zone within which your child can move freely, and you will receive a special notification if they cross it. The watch also has a voice monitoring function, allowing you to check what's happening in your child's surroundings. An SOS button provides additional support in an emergency.

name:
Garett GRC ACTIVITY 3 Smartwatch | Black 
(with Additional Black Silicone Quick Release Strap)
description:
Description

Movement. Style. Comfort.
Discover a smartwatch that keeps up with your pace. Featuring an AMOLED display protected by Gorilla Glass, a modern design and two straps included – silicone and fabric. Lightweight, unisex, and always ready – just like you.

Modernity In Your Style
The Activity3 impresses with its elegant design and functionality with its black body, quick release green stretchable fabric strap & an additional black silicone quick release strap.

A Screen That Delights
A 1.95″ AMOLED display with a resolution of 410 × 502 px guarantees saturated colours and excellent sharpness. The Always-On Display provides constant access to critical information and a variety of watch faces allow for full personalization. The whole thing is protected by scratch-resistant Gorilla Glass.

Ready Without Interruption
Up to 7 days of battery life on a single charge – enough to keep up with any plan or workout. Fast charging on the dedicated charging cradle lets you get back to work in no time.

Voice Control and Calls at Your Fingertips
Bluetooth connections directly from your wrist and quick control with the voice assistant. Simple solutions that simplify your daily pace.

Full Control Over Your Health
Measures heart rate, blood pressure, oxygen saturation, and sleep in one device. The breathing function helps maintain balance and relaxation.

Activity Without Limits
More than 100 sports modes allow you to tailor your workout to any schedule. Step and calorie tracking motivates you, and the flashlight comes in handy in any situation.

Effortless Control
The easy-to-use rotary button provides full control over the smartwatch's functions.

Smartwatch in Full Synchronization
Compatibility with Android and iOS enables full device synchronization. The proprietary Garett Smart app guarantees stable operation, secure data storage, and an intuitive interface.
