name:
Garett QUANTUM Smartwatch | BLACK STEEL 
(with Additional Black Leather Quick Release Strap)
description:
Description

Garett Quantum. Time Keeps Up
Its durable design with an AMOLED screen and Gorilla Glass ensures it's ready for action in any conditions. The Garett Quantum tracks health, activity, and notifications to support your daily routine, workouts, and energy-filled moments.

Bracelet and Strap. Elasticity as Standard.
The Garett Quantum offers two style options in one – an elegant black steel quick release bracelet and an additional quick release black leather strap. The included tool allows for quick and precise adjustment of the bracelet, ensuring the watch always fits perfectly.

1.43″ AMOLED with Always-On Display. Intelligence on Screen
The advanced 1.43-inch AMOLED screen displays every detail with full contrast and clarity. The Always-On Display feature ensures constant access to the time, and a rich library of watch faces allows you to personalize your smartwatch to suit your individual style – sporty, casual, or modern.

Gorilla Glass. Everyday Durability
The display is protected by scratch-resistant Gorilla Glass, designed to withstand the pace of everyday challenges and ensure full readability in every situation.

Slim Design. Maximum Comfort.
The ultra-thin 7.5mm design guarantees comfort in every situation, and the rotary function button provides quick and precise access to all smartwatch options.

A Week Without a Break
Garett Quantum works continuously for up to a week, and when it needs to be recharged, the practical USB stand allows you to do it easily and effortlessly.

Form Under Control
Timeless design meets practicality – the Garett Quantum tracks heart rate, blood pressure, blood oxygen levels, sleep, and stress. Instant data makes it easier to plan training, recovery, and daily activities.

Conversations at Your Wrist
The Garett Quantum allows you to make calls directly from your smartwatch thanks to the built-in microphone and speaker. A voice assistant activated with a single command ensures convenience and discretion in any situation.

Training at its Best

(with Additional White Leather Quick Release Strap)
description:
Description

GARETT ROSE SMARTWATCH
Beauty in Every Detail

The stylish Garett Rose smartwatch in rose gold is more than just an elegant accessory. It's your reliable assistant, supporting you every day. Take care of your health, track your activities, and look stylish. With this watch, you'll feel exceptional in every situation and achieve all your goals with grace!

AMOLED DISPLAY
Perfect Image Quality

The Garett Rose smartwatch features a 1.32-inch AMOLED screen with a resolution of 466 x 466 pixels, providing crisp visuals. With the Always-on Display feature and a wide selection of watch faces, you can customize the watch to suit your style and mood.

BLUETOOTH CONNECTIONS AND VOICE ASSISTANT
Contact at your Fingertips

Answer and make calls without having to reach for your phone. When needed, you can use the voice assistant feature to help you with everyday tasks.

ACTIVITY MONITORING
Always Under Control

Garett Rose measures your heart rate, blood pressure, and oxygen saturation levels, and also analyses your sleep quality. Additional features like a pedometer, calorie counter, and menstrual calendar will help you take care of your health every day.

POWERFUL BATTERY
Energy for the Whole Week

The watch is equipped with a 260 mAh battery, allowing it to operate for up to 7 days without needing to be recharged. The set includes a convenient induction charging cradle for easy charging.

TWO STRAPS INCLUDED
One Watch, so Many Possibilities

The Garett Rose Mesh comes with a rose gold quick release mesh strap & a white leather quick release strap allowing you to easily change your look and adapt the watch to any occasion.

SPORT MODES
Training at your Fingertips

The watch supports an active lifestyle with a wide variety of sport modes. Find your favourite sport and track your progress, and Garett Rose will motivate you to achieve even more.

ROTARY BUTTON
Intuitive Controls

Garett Rose is equipped with a rotating function button that facilitates menu navigation and quick function selection.

FULL COMPATIBILITY
Connectivity Without Obstacles

The smartwatch works with the dedicated Garett Smart app, enabling full integration with Android and iOS systems. This ensures that all the watch's functions are fully tailored to your needs and your data is properly secured.

GARETT SMART
Your Health Under Control

With the Garett Smart app, you'll gain a convenient tool to help you manage your fitness and figure. Track your steps, count calories burned, and analyse sleep quality. It's a simple way to gain health, energy, and confidence every day!

name: Groov-e GVPS110/SR Retro Series Personal CD Player - Silver
description:
Description

The Groov-e Personal CD Player will take you back to the 90s and give you the perfect excuse to listen to some golden oldies.

The classic LCD display and control buttons are just how they used to be – allowing you to skip and search through your favourite songs. The Anti-Skip Protection feature also prevents the music from jumping whilst you’re on the move.

Further functions include a battery indicator and a 20-track programmable memory. A pair of earphones are also included to get your started immediately!

The Groov-e Personal CD Player supports CD, CD-R and CD/RW playback and requires 2x AA batteries or 4.5V DC power input (not included).

A pair of earphones are also included to get your started immediately!

name: HoMedics TE-350 Non-Contact Infrared Body Thermometer
description:
Description

Non-Contact Temperature Measurement
The HoMedics Non-Contact Infrared Body Thermometer provides a clean and safe way to take multiple temperatures. The infrared sensor allows for non-contact measurements to be taken from 1-5cm away, offering extra protection against cross-contamination and spreading infections.

Instant Reading
The HoMedics Non-Contact Infrared Body Thermometer provides instant readings with a one-button control. After taking the measurement, the results will display in less than 2 seconds.

Easy To Read Icons
After the measurement is complete, the temperature will be displayed on the LCD screen and the backlight colour will change to red, green or yellow. With the colour coded results, easily understand your measurements. Green - Normal Temperature. Yellow - Slight fever warning. Red - High fever.

Non-invasive
Using a standard thermometer can sometimes be quite invasive, particularly for children who aren't aware of why they're having their temperature taken from their ear, armpit or mouth. The HoMedics Non-Contact Infrared Body Thermometer is the ideal solution if you want to take readings without bothering your child. Also if you're monitoring the temperature of your baby, you won't need to disrupt them during their nap.

Store Up To 50 Temperature Readings
Easily keep track of your temperature readings thanks to the stored memory within the thermometer. Store up to 50 temperature readings. To view your temperature history, simply press the MEMO button on the front of the device.

Surface Mode
The HoMedics Non-Contact Infrared Body Thermometer can also be used to check the temperature of foods and liquids such as baby milk. Also great for measuring the temperature of bath water.
short_description:
Features:
• Medical device
• Non-contact measuring
• Easy to use
• Instant reading
• Colour coded results
• Measures in ℃ and ℉
• Quick, compact and portable
• 2 x AAA batteries (included)
• 2-year guarantee
• Weight: 80g
• Size: L:12cm x W:9.6cm x H:4.2cm

name: Ikarao BREAK X1 Smart Karaoke Speaker 800W
description:
Description

About
Ikarao was born from a passion for music and technology. With 15 years of expertise in sound engineering, we’ve built a brand that offers affordable, high-quality audio products.

The iKarao Break X1 is an exquisite gift choice for karaoke aficionados. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions, this karaoke speaker serves not only as a source of musical entertainment but also as a PA system or Bluetooth speaker for events such as church gatherings. Its all-in-one design makes it particularly appealing to party enthusiasts and event organisers alike. Delight your friends, family, or significant others with the joy of singing and create unforgettable memories with this exceptional karaoke machine.

Immersive High-Fidelity Sound
Experience unparalleled audio with the Break X1, featuring a powerful 6.5-inch woofer and dual 2.6-inch tweeters.

With an SPL of 107dB and a frequency range of 45Hz-20kHz, it delivers crystal-clear sound and deep bass, making it ideal for any performance, from karaoke to street performances and public speeches.

13.3"" HD Touchscreen with Built-In Music Apps
Enjoy a vibrant audio experience with the 13.3-inch LCD-IPS touchscreen, featuring 1080p resolution and responsive touch controls. This screen ensures smooth navigation and clear display of lyrics, settings, and more.

Pre-installed with popular apps like Karafun and Spotify, it allows you to access karaoke songs, stream music, and enhance your live performances or presentations with ease.

Professional-Grade Wireless Microphone
Sing with confidence or deliver clear speeches using the Break X1’s wireless microphone, offering crystal-clear audio and a stable connection up to 10 meters.

Enjoy up to 30 hours of battery life with customizable sound effects for a perfect performance.

Extended Battery Life
Keep the event going with the Break X1’s impressive battery performance.

The microphone lasts up to 30 hours, while the speaker provides up to 6 hours of playtime with the screen on, ensuring uninterrupted fun and reliability for any occasion.

Customizable Audio Controls
Fine-tune your sound with intuitive controls for bass, treble, and echo.

The Break X1 allows precise adjustments to achieve your desired audio profile, whether you’re hosting a party, leading a workout session, or giving a public speech.

Versatile Connectivity Options
Connect effortlessly with USB, AUX In/Out, HDMI, and Bluetooth V5.4.

The Break X1 supports multiple device connections, providing flexibility and seamless integration with your audio setup for diverse events and performances.

Stable Wireless Performance
Enjoy reliable Bluetooth V5.4 and Wi-Fi 802.11ac connectivity with a range of up to 50 meters.

The Break X1 supports TWS (True Wireless Stereo), enabling a wireless multi-speaker setup for enhanced sound coverage in larger venues.


What's in the box
• 1 x Break X1
• 2 x Mics
• 1 x Carrying Strap
• 1 x Quick Guide
• 1 x Power Cable

description:

About
Ikarao was born from a passion for music and technology. With 15 years of expertise in sound engineering, we’ve built a brand that offers affordable, high-quality audio products.

The iKarao Shell S1 is an exquisite gift choice for karaoke aficionados. Perfect for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions, this karaoke speaker serves not only as a source of musical entertainment but also as a PA system or Bluetooth speaker for events such as church gatherings. Its all-in-one design makes it particularly appealing to party enthusiasts and event organisers alike. Delight your friends, family, or significant others with the joy of singing and create unforgettable memories with this exceptional karaoke machine.


Immersive High-Fidelity Sound
The Ikarao Shell S1 delivers impressive audio with dual 3.5-inch woofers and 1-inch tweeters, offering a sound pressure level (SPL) of 104dB.
With a frequency response of 48Hz-18kHz, it provides clear, well-balanced sound, ideal for gatherings, live performances, and outdoor events.

10.1"" HD Touchscreen with Built-In Karaoke & Music Apps
Navigate through your performances effortlessly with the 10.1-inch LCD-IPS touchscreen.
Featuring 800P resolution and responsive touch controls, it comes pre-installed with popular music apps like Karafun, Spotify, and Smule, allowing you to access karaoke songs or stream music easily, making it the perfect companion for any music event.

Professional-Grade Wireless Microphone
The dynamic wireless microphone offers stable, clear audio with a 10-meter range and a 15-hour battery life.
It features multiple sound effects and customizable settings, making it ideal for karaoke lovers, performers, and public speakers.

2X Self-charging Mics
Mics automatically recharge when placed in the speaker slot.  Party Non-Stop!
No more worries about power!

Everyone Can Sound Amazing
Makes you sound like a singer with Ikarao Exclusive EQ Tuning.

One Click Connection
Effortlessly connect and control your mic remotely with a single click for ultimate convenience.

Extended Battery Life for Long Events
With its 71Wh battery, the Ikarao Shell S1 offers up to 9 hours of playtime with the screen on and 12 hours with the screen off. This ensures you can keep the party going without worrying about power interruptions, even during extended events.

280W Peak Power
Music and vocals stay clear, high-quality sound encourages guests to join in and the sound fills every corner of the venue.

Thumping Beats Ready to Revel
Pump up your party 48Hz ultra-beat bass

Free your Phone with 10.1” Screen
Use YouTube and KaraFun on the Tablet! Sing without Interruptions! You can answer calls and reply to messages.

Exceptional Depth and Clarity
Experience deep bass from dual 3.5-inch woofers and crystal-clear highs from dual 1-inch tweeters with 2.2 sound channel.

Crisp Sound at Any Volume
The tilted tweeter (15°) reduces reflections, providing clear sound that stays crisp even at high volumes.

Customizable Sound Control
Fine-tune your performance with bass boost and clear audio controls, ensuring optimal sound for any event. Whether it’s for singing, presentations, or background music, the Ikarao Shell S1 gives you precise control over your audio experience.

Versatile Connectivity Options
Connect easily with USB, AUX In/Out, HDMI, and Bluetooth V5.4. Whether you’re streaming music, plugging in a microphone or guitar, or switching between devices, the Ikarao Shell S1 offers seamless transitions to suit any occasion.

Reliable Wireless Connectivity
With Bluetooth V5.4 and Wi-Fi 802.11ac, the Ikarao Shell S1 ensures stable, long-range connections up to 50 meters. This makes it easy to stay connected and perform without interruptions, whether you're indoors or outdoors.

For Outdoor Entertainment
Take the Ikarao S1 outdoors—its compact, durable design is perfect for any adventure. Enjoy great sound anywhere without worrying about recharging.

For Friends – Gatherings
Ikarao S1 enhances your parties with high-quality sound and portability. Its 8-inch touchscreen lets everyone sing along, and the long-lasting battery keeps the fun going.

For Performers or Singers
Ikarao S1 offers professional sound in a portable package. Connect microphones easily and perform anywhere with its multiple inputs and extended battery life.

Description

This smart laundry basket features a host of practical features that help make wash day less of a chore. Beneath the lid it has two 30-litre fabric tote bags allowing you to separate washing into light and dark/coloured fabrics. name: Joseph Joseph 50005JJ Glide Easy-store Ironing Board - Grey/Yellow
description:
Description

Conventional ironing boards are notoriously cumbersome household items. When removing from cupboards, their legs and feet can easily snag on door frames or other items and they can be awkward and noisy to set up. Glide is a revolutionary, full-size ironing board with a unique stand design that makes it more compact when stored than a conventional ironing board. When folded, the innovative leg mechanism means both sets of feet nest neatly together at one end of the board, making it less likely to snag when removing from storage. A large handle on the back makes carrying easy and this also doubles as a secure hanging point when used with the specially designed bracket (included), meaning it can be stored off the floor on the back of a door or inside a cupboard. With Glide, set-up is smoother too. Simply grip the handle, press the release lever on the underside and swing the tip of the board up to horizontal. The height can then be adjusted to seven different positions using the release lever, from 84 cm (33 inches) up to a maximum of 99 cm (39 inches). The cover features a 100% cotton top-layer, a heat-resistant silicone iron rest, a padded felt underlay and an easy-change toggle. Replacement covers available. Board size 130 x 38 cm (51.1 x 14.9 inches). Ironing surface 108 x 38 cm (42.5 x 14.9 inches). Closed (incl. legs) H136 x W38 x D8.5 cm (H53.5 x W15 x D3.3 inches). Frame guaranteed for 5 years against manufacturing defects.
short_description:
Features:

• Compact and slimline when folded

• Fast, easy set-up and adjustable to seven height positions

• Easy-change cover with heat-resistant silicone iron rest

• Separate hanging hook included for easy storage

• Easy-change cover with cord toggle

name: Joseph Joseph 50006JJ Glide Plus Easy-store Ironing Board with Advanced Cover - Black/Blue
description:
Description

Conventional ironing boards are notoriously cumbersome household items. When removing from cupboards, their legs and feet can easily snag on door frames or other items and they can be awkward and noisy to set up. Glide Plus is a revolutionary, full-size ironing board with a unique stand design that makes it more compact when stored than a conventional ironing board. When folded, the innovative leg mechanism means both sets of feet nest neatly together at one end of the board, making it less likely to snag when removing from storage. A large handle on the back makes carrying easy and this also doubles as a secure hanging point when used with the specially designed bracket (included), meaning it can be stored off the floor on the back of a door or inside a cupboard. With Glide Plus, set-up is smoother too. Simply grip the handle, press the release lever on the underside and swing the tip of the board up to horizontal. The height can then be adjusted to seven different positions using the release lever, from 84 cm (33 inches) up to a maximum of 99 cm (39 inches). Glide Plus comes with an advanced, multi-layer cover with DripShield™ Technology that's been designed to cope with large volumes of ironing or for use with steam generator irons. Firstly, it has a 100% cotton top-layer with a built-in, heat-resistant silicone iron rest. Beneath that is a 3D spacer mesh, which allows steam to flow freely across the board making ironing quicker and reduces damp spots. Next, a highly-absorbent padded felt layer spreads moisture rapidly whilst a waterproof but breathable base layer below prevents drips and allows excess moisture to wick away. With its cord toggle, the cover is also quick and easy to change. Replacement covers available. Board size 130 x 38 cm (51.1 x 14.9 inches). Ironing surface 108 x 38 cm (42.5 x 14.9 inches). Closed (incl. legs) H136 x W38 x D8.5 cm (H53.5 x W15 x D3.3 inches). Frame guaranteed for 5 years against manufacturing defects.

description:

Compact And Convenient
Ironing boards are often fiddly to set up and difficult to store away. Pocket, however, breaks the mould. name:
LENCO LBTA-165BK - Fully Automatic Record Player with Bluetooth® Transmission and Pre-Amplifier - Metal Turntable Platter and 
Tonearm | Black
description:
Description

The Lenco LBTA-165BK is a fully automatic record player that combines the best of traditional vinyl sound with modern technology. Thanks to auto start and auto return, minimal manual interaction is required: the tonearm automatically moves to the correct position and returns to its resting position after playback. With Bluetooth® 5.3 transmission, you can easily stream your favourite music to any compatible speaker or headphones, while the built-in pre-amplifier ensures a rich, dynamic sound. The LBTA-165BK combines a wooden casing with a metal turntable platter and a metal tonearm fitted with an AT3600L cartridge. This gives the record player a stylish look and provides the stability and sound quality essential for an exceptional listening experience. Order now and experience the perfect combination of vintage charm and modern technology with the Lenco LBTA-165BK.

What is a Fully Automatic Record Player?
A fully automatic record player is one that performs all steps of playing a vinyl record automatically. This means that, with just a press of the start button, the tonearm automatically moves to the beginning of the record and places the stylus in the correct position to play the record. When the record finishes, the tonearm automatically returns to its resting position, and the record player stops spinning. This brings the following benefits with the LBTA-165BK:

The record player automatically starts playing, and the tonearm also automatically returns to the resting position. This provides enhanced ease of use.
The auto return of the tonearm prevents the stylus from continuing to spin at the end of the record, reducing wear on both the stylus and the record. This results in longer durability for both the stylus and the record.
Fully automatic record players ensure consistent and precise stylus placement at the start of the record, offering a stable listening experience without manual margin for error.
Bluetooth® 5.3 transmission

The LBTA-165BK not only brings the warm, classic tones of vinyl to life but also effortlessly connects with the modern audio world. With Bluetooth transmission, you can enjoy the freedom of wireless connection to your favourite Bluetooth speaker or Bluetooth headphones. Then, simply stream your favourite music, cable-free and with a stable, high-quality connection. Of course, you can also use the RCA cable and grounding to connect to an external amplifier or active speaker.

Wooden casing
While most fully automatic record players come with a plastic casing, the Lenco LBTA-165BK distinguishes itself with its beautiful wooden casing. The wooden casing ensures high quality and a luxurious appearance. Choosing the LBTA-165BK is therefore also a choice for aesthetics and durability.

Metal Turntable Platter and Tonearm
Other unique features of this record player include the metal turntable platter and metal tonearm. The metal turntable platter effectively reduces vibrations, while the metal tonearm provides a stable stylus position. Thanks to the high-quality materials of these components, you enjoy clearer sound and accurate music reproduction.

AT3600L Cartridge
The record player comes with an Audio Technica AT3600L Moving Magnetic Cartridge (MMC). This cartridge, containing the stylus that tracks the grooves of your vinyl records, ensures each note comes to life with precision.

The Lenco LBTA-165 also comes with a plastic dust cover and a turntable slip mat. The LBTA-165 is available in two colours: black (LBTA-165BK) and wood (LBTA-165WD). All Lenco products come with a 24-month warranty.
short_description:
Features:
• Fully automatic record player: auto start and auto return
• Bluetooth® 5.3 transmission
• AT3600L Moving Magnetic Cartridge
• Metal turntable platter and tonearm
• High-quality wooden casing
• Two rated speed settings: 33 RPM and 45 RPM
• Pre-amplifier ON-OFF
• Belt drive
• Supplied with detachable dust cover and turntable slip mat

description:
Description

Experience ultimate viewing pleasure with the Lenco LPJ-280WH, an LCD projector with high resolution, designed for anyone seeking quality and extensive functionality. The projector supports Full HD 1080P content and offers clear, sharp image quality. With 2800 lumens and a contrast ratio of 3000:1, you will enjoy vibrant colours and deep blacks. With an impressive LED lifespan of up to 30,000 hours, built-in stereo speakers, and a handy remote control, the LPJ-280WH is the ideal choice for a long-lasting and immersive viewing experience. Sit back on the sofa and play your favourite films and DVDs on the Lenco LPJ-280WH. Organise the best movie nights with family and friends, use this projector for playing homemade videos, and showcase the finest business presentations.

Cinema Experience
Transform your living room into a real cinema with the Lenco LPJ-280WH. With a brightness of 2800 lumens and a contrast ratio of 3000:1, you will experience excellent and clear image quality. Ideal for streaming your TV, movies, Netflix series, or games via a cast dongle (such as Chromecast). The resolution of this LCD projector is 800x480, and it supports Full HD 1080P content. Everything you need for your own home cinema at an affordable price!

Easy to Use
The Lenco LPJ-280WH is compact and can be placed anywhere. Additionally, this projector is easy and quick to set up. It features numerous connection options, such as 2 HDMI ports, 1 USB port, 1 Micro-SD card slot, 1 AV input, and 1 VGA connection. The projector is MHL compatible, so you can easily connect your Android or Apple device with an MHL cable (optional). The included remote control completes the LPJ-280WH.

What is the Projection Distance of This Projector?
This projector has a projection distance of 1 to 5 metres to achieve the optimal image. Additionally, the projection size of this device is 250 cm.

How Long Does the LED Lamp of This Projector Last?
The LED lamp of this projector lasts up to 30,000 hours. More than enough for almost endless viewing pleasure.

name: LENCO LS-440BUBG - Turntable with 4 Built-In Speakers | Fabric
description:
Description

The Lenco LS-440 is a turntable with built-in speakers. The 4 speakers, 2 x 15 watts and 2 x 10 watts, provide a well-balanced sound. The turntable is easy to use: simply plug it into the power outlet and you can immediately enjoy your favourite LP! Or stream your playlist from your smartphone or tablet via Bluetooth® 5.0 to the speakers in the turntable. If you want to retreat and relax with your favourite music, simply connect a pair of headphones.

Perfect for LPs and Singles
With adjustable speed, you can choose between 33 and 45 RPM and easily play singles and LPs. The LS-440 is a belt-driven turntable and is equipped with a high-quality Audio-Technica cartridge, ensuring optimal audio quality and prolonging the lifespan of your LPs.

With Start-Stop Function
The start-stop button allows you to stop the record at any time and resume later exactly where you left off.

Built-In Preamplifier
The Lenco LS-440 features a preamplifier that can be switched on and off. This turntable also includes pitch control, allowing you to manually adjust the playback speed, as well as tone control, enabling you to adjust the highs and lows.

With Plastic Dust Cover
The plastic dust cover ensures that your turntable does not get covered in dust. The Lenco LS-440 is finished with a beautiful fabric and is available in anthracite or beige/light blue.


Integrated High-Quality Speakers: The Lenco LS-440 features a built-in speaker system consisting of two 15 Watt and two 10-Watt speakers, providing a total output power of 50 Watts. This configuration ensures a balanced and high-quality sound output, ideal for an immersive vinyl listening experience.

Wireless Connectivity and User-Friendly Operation: Equipped with Bluetooth® 5.0, the turntable offers the convenience of wireless streaming from smartphones or tablets. It's designed for easy operation; simply plug in the turntable and enjoy your favourite LPs or stream music directly to its speakers.

Advanced Audio Components and Controls: The turntable includes a high-quality Audio-Technica moving magnet cartridge (MMC) and a belt drive mechanism for optimal sound quality and vinyl record preservation. It also features pitch control for manual adjustment of playback speed, and tone control for customizing high and low tones.

Elegant Design with Dust Protection: The LS-440 boasts a stylish design, finished in blue-taupe fabric, adding a modern touch to any room. It comes with a plastic dust cover to protect the turntable from dust and debris, ensuring the longevity of the device.

Versatile Playback and Additional Features: Offers adjustable speed settings of 33 and 45 RPM, suitable for playing a variety of record sizes (7, 10, 12 inches). The turntable is equipped with a preamplifier that can be turned on or off, depending on your audio setup preferences. Additional accessories include a 45 TPM adaptor, AC adaptor, AT3600 cartridge, cleaning cloth, counterweight, dust cover, and slip mat. The product is backed by a 24-month warranty.

What's in the box?
• LS-440 turntable
• Cartridge
• Dust cover
• AC adapter
• CE-UK multi-plug
• Manual NL/EN/DE/FR/ES/IT/RU

name: LENCO LS-470WA Turntable with Bluetooth Connectivity | Walnut
description:
Description

Introducing the Lenco LS-470WA, an all-in-one turntable from Lenco's Expertise line with a stunning, robust design in the elegant walnut colour. The LS-470WA is a turntable with built-in speakers, belt drive, and Bluetooth®, featuring a high-quality Audio Technica cartridge. The detachable dust cover protects your turntable from dust, while the unique design and elegant dark wood finish add a touch of class to the immediate surroundings of the turntable.

Built-in Speakers (80W)
The four built-in speakers, two of 30W and two of 10W, deliver a powerful and balanced sound. This allows you to fully enjoy the warm tones of vinyl, but thanks to Bluetooth compatibility, the LS-470WA also provides the option to enjoy your favourite music from devices like your smartphone, tablet, or laptop.

Exceptional Sound Reproduction with Belt Drive
Further enhancing the sound reproduction of the LS-470WA is the reliable belt drive of the turntable. Belt drive, known for its smooth and low-vibration operation, ensures a clear and accurate playback of your beloved records. The turntable supports playing records at two speeds: 33 and 45 revolutions per minute. The elastic belt ensures a smooth and consistent rotation, resulting in a versatile turntable effortlessly switching between both speeds to meet the modern needs of audio enthusiasts.

Moving Magnetic Cartridge
The turntable comes with an Audio Technica AT-3600 Moving Magnetic Cartridge (MMC). This element, containing the needle that tracks the grooves of your vinyl records, ensures that each note comes to life with precision.

Simple Operation, Despite Various Features
Despite its extensive features, operating the LS-470WA remains effortless and intuitive. Power your turntable and immediately enjoy your favourite vinyl records. The start-stop button allows you to stop the record at any time and restart it where you left off. Additionally, the LS-470WA features an RCA output and an AUX input, and the turntable enables encoding your favourite tracks in mp3 format via the included USB cable.

Lenco's Expertise Line
At Lenco, we are dedicated to creating high-quality products at a fair price. We proudly introduce our 'Expertise' line, inspired by our legacy since 1946, where we have consistently delivered innovative turntables and hi-fi products to our valued customers. Our Expertise line showcases our finest turntables, featuring the latest technologies, premium materials, and superior cartridges. The same level of excellence extends to our radios, with high-quality materials, outstanding specifications, and warm, crystal-clear sound. All of this is designed to delight the eyes and ears of the most enthusiastic music lovers.

What's in the box?
• Lenco LS-470WA
• Audio Technica Moving Magnetic Cartridge
• Detachable dust cover
• CE-UK multi-plug AC adapter
• USB cable
• Manual EN/NL/DE/FR/ES/IT/DK/SE/RU
short_description:
Features:
• All-in-one turntable with 4 built-in speakers
• Bluetooth 5.0 reception
• Moving Magnetic Cartridge (MMC)
• Output power: 70W RMS (speakers 80W)
• Two speed settings: 33 RPM and 45 RPM
• Belt drive
• Start-stop control
• Pre-amplifier ON-OFF
• Detachable dust cover
• MP3 encoding function through PC
• Included: CE-UK multi-plug AC adapter, USB cable

name: LENCO MC-020 PRINCESS - Micro set with FM Radio, Bluetooth®, USB and AUX ingang
description:
Description

The Lenco MC-020 offers you a great audio experience with your favourite music via FM radio, Bluetooth, USB and AUX. It is available in 4 different prints/designs.

The Lenco MC-020 is a micro music system with Bluetooth®, USB and an AUX input for your bedroom. Discover how powerful the loudspeakers are together with your friends, or plug your headphones to shut out the world and listen to your favourite song on repeat. 

The Lenco MC-020 lets you play music in whatever way you desire, all night long.
Place your telephone or tablet in the holder on top of the system and connect it via Bluetooth® or USB. Now you can stream music from all your favourite apps. 

After playing your music, you can also use the Lenco MC-020 as an alarm clock. The snooze function lets you delay getting out of bed for as long as you want. Furthermore, you never need to worry about being late for school with the Lenco MC-020 because the backup batteries ensure that the alarm always goes off, even if there is a power failure.

The micro music system is available in 2 optional finishes. Pink with a Princess and brightly coloured graffiti.
short_description:

• PLL FM Radio
• Clock and Alarm Function
• USB player / charger
• Output power: 2 x 5 Watt (RMS)
• Included: AC adaptor, phone/tablet holder
• Connections: AUX, USB, 3,5mm earphones jack

name: LENCO MC-160WD-UK Turntable with Bluetooth and Speakers | Wood
description:
Description

Experience the ultimate HiFi system with turntable. Stream music effortlessly with Bluetooth 5.0 and enjoy endless music choices with DAB+ and FM radio.

The powerful turntable supports different speeds, while the wooden speakers provide rich and balanced sound.
Easily convert vinyl records to digital format with Direct MP3 encoding and preserve your music memories.
The Lenco MC-160WD offers convenience, versatility, and superior sound quality in one package.

STEREO SYSTEM WITH TURNTABLE, DAB+/FM RADIO AND BLUETOOTH
Experience music like never before with the Lenco MC-160WD: The Ultimate HiFi System with Turntable! This cutting-edge system combines modern technology with a touch of nostalgia to deliver an unparalleled music experience.

Thanks to Bluetooth 5.0, the Lenco MC-160WD allows you to effortlessly connect your devices and enjoy wireless music streaming. No more dealing with tangled cables – just pure, seamless connectivity.

But that's not all! With DAB+ and FM radio, the Lenco MC-160WD opens a world of musical possibilities. Tune in to your favourite stations and explore new sounds that will captivate your ears.

The highlight of this system is its powerful turntable with 3 rated speed settings: 33 RPM, 45 RPM, and 78 RPM. Whether you're dusting off vintage vinyl records or playing the latest releases, the turntable delivers exceptional audio quality that takes you back in time.

What sets the Lenco MC-160WD apart is its Direct MP3 encoding feature. Convert your beloved vinyl records into digital format with ease by connecting a USB stick. Preserve your precious music memories and carry them with you wherever you go.

The reliable belt drive ensures smooth and consistent playback, faithfully reproducing every note, beat, and lyric for an immersive listening experience.

Included with the Lenco MC-160WD are two stylish wooden speakers that complement its elegant design. These speakers deliver a rich and balanced sound, filling your room with crisp highs and deep lows. Get ready to be enveloped in a world of musical bliss.

With an output power of 2 x 10 Watt, this HiFi system packs a punch, creating the perfect atmosphere for any occasion, from private parties to quiet evenings at home.

The package comes with a remote control and an AC adaptor, providing easy control and power options. Connect your devices effortlessly using the USB, AUX, or 3.5mm earphone jack. The Lenco MC-160WD offers versatility and convenience at your fingertips.

Get ready to revolutionise the way you enjoy music with the Lenco MC-160WD. Its state-of-the-art features, sleek design, and exceptional audio quality make it the ultimate HiFi system with a turntable. Elevate your music experience and immerse yourself in the world of sound.


Technical Specifications:
• Supported audio format: MP3
• Connections: USB, AUX, 3.5mm Headphone Output
• Included: Remote Control, AC Adapter
• Main unit dimensions (h x w x d): 14.4 x 34 x 30.6 cm
• Speaker dimensions each unit (h x w x d): 20 x 13 x 12 cm
short_description:

• Direct MP3 encoding, from vinyl to USB stick
• Three speed settings: 33 RPM, 45 RPM, and 78 RPM

name: LENCO MCR-113BK - Portable Hand Crank Emergency Radio, Flashlight and Power Bank in One - Black
description:
Description

This MCR-113BK emergency radio from Lenco is an all-in-one portable radio with multiple practical features. The radio can also be used as a flashlight or power bank. The greatest advantage of this radio is that it does not require a nearby power outlet nor does it need batteries. You can generate the necessary power yourself by using the hand crank or the solar panel on top of the radio to charge it. Should there be power available, you can also charge the Lenco MCR-113BK with a USB-C cable.

With the radio, you can receive FM radio stations. Easily use the radio as a power bank thanks to the included USB-C cable. With a capacity of 1200 mAh, your phone will be charged up in no time! Additionally, you can use the cable to easily charge the radio. In real emergencies, the SOS alarm provides extra safety. Moreover, there is a built-in flashlight, ideal for when it gets dark or if you're searching for something. The radio is compact and therefore easy to carry, perfect for camping, hiking, travelling, but also for real emergencies.

The Radio is Essential for:
• Home use: always a reliable radio at hand, both inside and outside the house.
• Outdoor adventures: ideal for camping, survival trips or as a handy travel companion on holiday.
• Emergencies: stay informed during power or internet outages by accessing emergency frequencies.


Technical Specifications:
• FM/SW radio
• Telescopic antenna
• Power bank 1200 mAh
• Connections: USB, USB-C, 3.5mm headphone jack
• Dimensions (H x W x D): 7.7 x 13.5 x 5.2 cm
• Weight: 0.218 kg

What's in the Box?
• Lenco MCR-113BK
• USB-C charging cable
• User manual in NL/EN/DE/FR/ES/DK/SE

This emergency radio from Lenco is a multifunctional radio, power bank, and flashlight all in one. The radio is indispensable in every household and should always be part of your emergency kit!
short_description:
Features:
• Listening to FM or SW (shortwave) radio frequencies
• Bright flashlight function
• Power bank for charging your mobile phone, among other devices
• Powerful emergency siren
• Battery life: up to 15 hours
• Four ways to generate power: wind-up, solar energy, USB-C cable, or 3 AAA batteries (not included)
• LED lighting and LED indicators for battery status
• Compact and portable
• Easy to use
• Includes: USB-C charging cable

name: LENCO MPR-035BK-UK Compact Portable FM Radio with LCD Display - Black
description:
Description

The Lenco MPR-035BK is a black portable PLL FM radio with an LCD screen that combines functionality with ease of use. The radio is thanks to its sleek and compact design, the perfect companion for on the go, easily carried in your bag or backpack. The radio can operate both on batteries and mains power.

Strong and Stable Reception
The advanced built-in PLL FM radio technology ensures optimal reception of FM stations with minimal interference. Additionally, strong and stable reception is guaranteed by the telescopic aerial. The MPR-035BK thus enables you to enjoy a wide range of stations.

Simple to Use
Thanks to the clear 2.5-inch LCD screen, you'll always have a clear view of the FM frequency. This means no more guessing which frequency you're listening to – the Lenco MPR-035BK provides you with the details you need at a glance. With the 5 direct preset buttons on the front of the Lenco MPR-035BK, you can also quickly find your favourite radio station. In total, the radio even lets you store up to 20 FM stations as preset favourites.

Compatible with Headphones
The radio comes with a 3.5mm audio output, allowing you to easily connect headphones for a personal sound experience.


What's in the Box?
Lenco MPR-035BK
AC adaptor
Manual EN/NL/DE/FR/ES/DK/SE/PL

name: LENCO PA-220BK P.A.with Subwoofer & Detachable Tweeter Column & 2 Mics
description:
Description

The Lenco PA-220 is a Bluetooth party speaker that gives you huge sound, convenient wireless streaming, and attention-grabbing lighting effects. It includes a large 10-inch subwoofer for huge, rumbling bass, and a tweeter column to make sure your high-end remains detailed and present, giving it a punchy sound. Then, set the tone for your party with built-in lighting effects in time with your music, and you've got a night to remember.

The PA-220 is filled with plenty of extras too. Don't have a Bluetooth device to hand? There's an on-board FM radio or a USB slot for playing from memory sticks, so you'll never run out of listening options. Thanks to Class D amplification, this speaker is lightweight and portable without sacrificing durability. An X-Drive function helps to emphasise bass frequencies, ideal for larger or open-air spaces.

For live performances, the PA-220 has dual inputs for microphones, with two wireless microphones straight out of the box. This makes the PA-220 ideal for karaoke parties, with Bluetooth connectivity allowing you to stream karaoke tracks directly to your speaker.
short_description:
Features:
• Bluetooth party speaker with wireless microphones
• Column design ensures huge bass and detailed treble
• Lighting effects can be triggered in time with music
• Built-in FM radio and USB device playback
• Ideal for putting on karaoke parties
•

description:

Add colour to your music with this handy portable FM radio from Lenco! The Lenco SCD-24 with its built-in CD-player is easy to operate due to its clear buttons and repeat function.

The Lenco SCD-24 is a portable FM radio/CD player for young and old. With its simple design, the Lenco SCD-24 is easy to operate. All you need to do is connect the Lenco SCD-24 to an electrical wall socket or battery supply. With one push of a button, you can immediately enjoy listening to your favourite CD or radio station.

The Lenco SCD-24 has a compact size and is equipped with a handle for easy transportation. Take the Lenco SCD-24 with you to the park or to a party with friends, sing-a-long and dance to your favourite tunes and artist.

The Lenco SCD-24 adds colour to your music and allows you to listen to your favourite songs anytime, anywhere! Thanks to the programmable memory, you can store the music you prefer and endlessly listen to your own favourite music.

The Lenco SCD-24 is available in 4 colours: blue/black, white, black/silver and pink.

name: LENCO TCD-2551WD Classic Phono Retro turntable – 8-in-1
description:
Description

The Classic Phono (by Lenco) TCD-2551WD is an all-in-one multifunctional music system with a stunning retro design that enhances any interior. The TCD-2551WD is characterized by the built-in record player with belt drive but offers so much more. Effortlessly blending classic functionalities with modern playback options, the wooden retro record player features Bluetooth® reception, AM/FM radio, a built-in CD player, and a cassette player. This provides a complete listening experience with the perfect balance between the nostalgic charm of vintage aesthetics and modern functionality. The TCD-2551WD has an MDF housing and comes with a remote control for added convenience.

Belt-drive Record Player
Thanks to the reliable belt drive, a technology known for its smooth and low-vibration operation, the record player delivers clear and precise playback of your beloved records. The record player supports playing records at three speeds: 33, 45, or 78 revolutions per minute. Using the metal hinge, you can position the lid of the retro record player at a 45° angle, allowing you to play your records with both an open and closed cabinet. Additionally, you can convert your favourite tracks to MP3 with the built-in USB encoding.

Various Playback Options
The Classic Phono TCD-2551WD is versatile in its use. In addition to playing your favourite records, you can easily stream playlists from your smartphone or tablet using Bluetooth 5.0. Moreover, play your CDs with the built-in CD player and tune in to your favourite radio stations with the integrated AM/FM radio. Using the analogue tuner at the front of the TCD-2551WD, a classic element in radio technology, you can manually navigate through radio frequencies. The audio system also allows you to revisit the nostalgia of cassette tapes. Keep control of all your playback settings with the clear LCD screen. In addition to converting vinyl to MP3, it is possible to convert CD, Bluetooth, radio, and line-in to MP3 and save it on a USB stick.

Two built-in Speakers
Enjoy a clear, warm, and high-quality sound with the two built-in speakers, each with a power of 5 Watts RMS. Whether you're savouring the warm tones of vinyl, the refined sounds of a CD, or the nostalgia of a cassette tape, the speakers offer rich sound reproduction.

Classic Phono by Lenco
Discover the nostalgic charm of Classic Phono record players, a proud representation of over seventy-five years of Lenco's expertise in Hi-Fi and consumer electronics. The innovation and reliability that define Lenco are reflected in the warm tones and enduring performance of our Classic Phono record players with a timeless retro design. Experience your music in an authentic and stylish manner, supported by the proven quality of Lenco. Classic Phono, where the past and present come together.


What's in the box?
• Classic Phono TCD-2551WD
• Remote control
• Power cable
• Manual NL/EN/DE/FR/ES/DK/SE

name: Magimix 11047 Le Glacier Ice Cream Maker 1.1L -  White
description:
Description

Magimix Le Glacier 1.1Litre

The Le Glacier Ice Cream Maker is simple and elegant. Slowly mixing and churning your chosen mixture of fresh flavours, while the mixture is freezing, it delivers ice cream with a uniform smooth and light texture in a matter of minutes.

Not just limited to ice cream, this machine can also deliver delicious sorbet or frozen yoghurt. Just add your mixture to your pre-frozen bowl (8-12 hours frozen), and with the click of a button your very own tasty ice cream will be ready in 20 minutes.


Key Features:
• Large Feed Tube:
The large feed tube allows for the easy pouring of ingredients into the bowl - less mess = less cleaning.

• One Button Function:
With just one button this product is designed to be simple and efficient.


• Removable Paddle:
The removable paddle allows for easy cleaning and consistent preparation. Resulting in less time cleaning and more time enjoying your delicious ice cream.


• Easy to use – pre freeze the bowl for 8-12 hours.
• Stainless Steel inner bowls for faster freezing.

• Extra bowls available for greater flexibility.
• Large feed tube for ease of pouring ingredients.
• Easy to clean after use with warm soapy water.
• Clear lid to see when the ice cream is ready.
• Range of sizes to suit your needs and freezer size.

Weight: 2.8Kg

name: Magimix 11629 Power Blender - Red
description:
Description

Add power to your blending with the Magimix Power Blender

Power Blender, by Magimix:
This compact, yet powerful blender is the ideal addition any kitchen. The powerful motor can spin the stainless steel blades at 22,000 RPM, so it can tackle tough ingredients with ease, and the heat resistant BPA-free jug allows you blend hot or cold recipes. This blender has been Quiet Mark approved, so even when dealing with the toughest ingredients, it won't make a racket.


- Easy to clean - completely disassembles
- Large 1.8L capacity jug
- 1300 watt output
- Heat-resistant Borosilicate glass jug - BPA free
- Quiet Mark Approval


The blender features 5 automatic programmes for easy use; Smoothie - for making milkshakes, smoothies, juices and cocktails. Soup - for making creamy and velvety soups, either hot or cold. Frozen dessert - for pureeing frozen, thick and dense ingredients to create ice creams, gelato and sorbet. Ice - for crushing ice cubes Auto Clean - add water and a drop of washing up liquid for easy cleaning. A useful spatula, and a handy book with 88 healthy recipes are included.


SOUPS
For making soups, creams and veloutés, hot and cold.

SMOOTHIES
For blending smoothies, juices, milkshakes and cocktails.

ICE
For breaking and crushing ice cubes.

FROZEN DESSERTS
For puréeing frozen, thick and dense ingredients

BLENDERMIX
Magimix patented technology for a finer blend

COLD MIX
Maintains temperature throughout blending; ensures no nutrients lost

1.8L BOROSILICATE GLASS
Very durable jug, easy to clean and capable of mixing both hot and cold

HIGH PERFORMANCE
22,000 rpm, giving you that smoother finish faster

name: Magimix 11651 Food Slicer T190
description:
Description

Professional slicer, perfect for salami sausages or cheese

Magimix 11651 Food Slicer: - 
This Magimix food slicer with elegant, slick design, brings an expert touch to your kitchen.

name: Philips CX2120/01 2000 SERIES Ceramic Compact Heater | Dark Grey
description:
Description

The Fastest Way to Warm Up Your Space

Experience remarkable heating speeds and whisper-quiet performance in a compact design. Featuring rapid 2-second heating with adjustable power up to 1500W, advanced safety features, and easy portability.


Immediate Comfort with Rapid 2-Second Heating
Experience powerful, immediate warmth in just 2 seconds with adjustable power up to 1500W. Ideal for rooms up to 15m2 in size.


Ultra-Quiet with Noise Levels Lower Than a Whisper
Experience the comfort of warmth with noise levels as low as 24dB(A) - quieter than a whisper - thanks to its low-noise DC motor (2). Ideal for a restful night’s sleep, a focused office environment or a peaceful ambiance in your living room.


5x Advanced Safety Features for Peace of Mind
The 2000 series is built with 5 advanced safety features: (1) tip-over protection, (2) 65° overheat protection, (3) a VDE-certified safety plug, (4) flame retardant materials, and (5) a safety auto-off after 16 hours of inactivity. Providing warmth that you can trust.


Customize your Experience with 5 Versatile Modes
Choose from 2 power modes: gentle heating at 600W or powerful heating at 1500W. For energy savings up to 25%(1), set your target temperature from 3 levels - Low, Medium, or High - which automatically maintain the ambient temperature within different temperature ranges.


Sleek and Compact Design
The 2000 series combine powerful warmth with a sleek, stylish design that complements any room. With its compact dimensions of just 24.9cm in height and 17.7cm in width, it can fit seamlessly into any corner.


Easy to Carry with a Built-In Handle
Wherever you need warmth, our heater is there. Designed for easy portability, its lightweight build at just 1.51kg and convenient built-in handle at the back allow you to move it from room to room effortlessly. Enjoy warmth wherever you choose to relax or work.


Thoroughly Tested for Durability and Quality
When choosing Philips, you choose a trusted brand with more than 80 years of experience and innovation in air care. Our compact fan heaters go through 122 tests to ensure they provide you with reliable, long-lasting comfort, today and tomorrow.

• Whisper quiet at 24dB(A)
• 5x advanced safety features
• 5 Versatile Modes
• Compact
• Built in Handle

name: Philips DST3041-89 3000 Series 2600W Steam Iron
description:
Description

Powerful steam to tackle every crease
Our steam iron 3000 series makes ironing easy with the powerful steam boost that tackles tough creases. The ceramic soleplate ensures smooth gliding, while the 300 ml water tank is large enough to finish smaller ironing loads without a refill.

Continuous Steam Up To 40 g/min For Consistent Performance
Strong and consistent steam output to remove creases faster.

Steam Boost Up To 200 gram For Extra Power
The strong steam boost gives you that extra power to penetrate deeper into the fabric and cut through the tough creases easily.

2600 Watt For Fast Heat-up
Delivers fast warm-up and powerful performance.

Smooth Gliding Ceramic Soleplate
Our durable ceramic soleplate glides well on any ironable garment. It does not stick to your garment, is scratch resistant and easy to keep clean.

Our Drip-Stop Prevents Water Dripping on Your Garment
Our drip-stop system prevents leakage to avoid stains from water droplets, so you can iron with confidence at any temperature.

Vertical Steaming For Hanging Fabrics
With the vertical steam function, you can refresh garments right on the hanger and remove creases from hanging fabrics such as curtains. No ironing board required.


Reach Difficult Places Easily With The Triple Precision Tip
The tip is precise in 3 ways: it has a pointed tip, button groove and sleek nose design. Our triple precision tip helps you handle even the hardest-to-iron spots, like buttons and pleats.


Built-in Calc-clean Slider, Long-lasting Steam Performance
This iron operates with ordinary tap water. Calc-clean is a built-in cleaning function to remove calcium build-up, or lime scale, and maintain peak performance.

Iron More In One Go With The 300 ml Water Tank
Fewer refills are required thanks to a large 300 ml water tank, so you can iron more clothes in one go.

Extra-long 2.5m Cord
An extra-long 2.5 metre cord provides maximum reach to anywhere on the ironing board and convenience.

• 2600 W power
• 40 g/min continuous steam
• 200 g Steam Boost
• Ceramic

name: Philips EP3347/90 S3300 SERIES Fully Automatic Espresso Machine | Black Chrome
description:
Description

The Easiest Way to Enjoy Fresh Bean Coffees
Enjoy 6 drinks in one touch, with the perfect crema, aroma and temperature. LatteGo automatically prepares silky smooth milk froth for your milky coffees, is easy to set up and can be cleaned in as little as 10 seconds*.

Up to 5000 Cups** Without Descaling Thanks to Aquaclean
By changing the filter after being prompted by the machine, you will not need to descale your machine for up to 5000 cups**, while enjoying clear and purified water.

40% Quieter with SilentBrew, Same Delicious Coffee
Our patented SilentBrew technology reduces machine sounds so you can enjoy the experience of brewing aromatic coffee more. Using sound shielding and quiet grinding, our machines make 40% less noise than earlier models and come with a Quiet Mark certification.

Silky-Smooth Froth with LatteGo for Various Types of Milk
At the touch of a button, LatteGo automatically prepares silky smooth milk froth for your milky coffees, thanks to its powerful cyclonic frothing technology, even with your favourite plant-based milk alternatives.

Enriched Flavour with Our Hard-Wearing Ceramic Grinder
Bring out the full flavour of your coffee with our hard-wearing ceramic grinder. The durable ceramic grinder can be adjusted in 12 steps, from fine to coarse grindings.

Find Inspiration and Support on our App
Learn the ins and outs of your machine and discover new cafe-style coffee recipes on our HomeID app.

Enjoy 6 Hot & Refreshing Drinks in One Touch
Enjoy 5 popular coffee recipes, from classic espresso, regular black coffee, cappuccino, latte macchiato, to iced coffee, with the prefect crema, aroma and temperature. Hot water for tea is also available. Our unique brewing system perfectly extracts the beans flavours with a slower flow rate and at lower temperature. Add ice cubes to your drink and enjoy a delicious iced coffee, with no compromise on coffee intensity.

LatteGo, the Fastest to Clean Milk System: 2 Parts, No Tube
LatteGo is the fastest to clean milk system with only 2 parts, no tubes and can be cleaned in 10 seconds under tap or in the dishwasher. Philips is not offering automatic cleaning as it requires complementary cleaning.

Easy Coffee Selection and Customization
Easily select your favourite drinks thanks to the modern touch screen display with coloured icons. Adjust your coffee your way with the My Coffee Choice function: choose your preferred coffee strength, length, and milk froth level, just to your taste.

Large Tank for Long Use

Safe On All Ironable Garments, Guaranteed Not to Burn
Thanks to OptimalTEMP technology, we guarantee that this iron will never cause burns to any ironable fabric. You can even leave it resting face down on your clothes or ironing board. No burns, no shine. Guaranteed.

OptimalTEMP Technology, No Temperature Settings Required
Iron everything from silk to jeans without adjusting the temperature. Thanks to OptimalTEMP, no dial or settings are needed. So, there is no more pre-sorting the laundry, or waiting for the iron to heat up and cool down. You're ready for any fabric, any time.

Carry Lock for Safe and Easy Transport

Calc-Clean Container Included - No Cartridges, No Extra Cost

Scratch-Resistant SteamGlide Soleplate Provides Good Gliding

description:
Description

Smooth blends with no lumps in 45 seconds*

Designed to improve your everyday blending, with the 450W power and blade performance you need to take on all your ingredients and even crush ice. Delivering a smooth consistency with minimal effort and in no time at all.

Unique ProBlend System Ensures Smooth Consistency
Unique ProBlend system perfectly combines 3 technologies, custom-designed to ensure smooth blending with no lumps in just 45 seconds*. The 450W power motor drives the blending flow to circulate all your ingredients evenly, while the innovative blade design is specially shaped to maximize the cutting area. Last but not least, the jar is designed with unique ribs to continuously guide ingredients back into the blending flow.

Crushes Ice into Fine Pieces in Just 45 Seconds**
Use the ProBlend system plus the Pulse setting to crush ice cubes into fine pieces in just 45 seconds**. Perfect for your favourite chilled drinks and smoothies, and great for special desserts.

Easy To Clean and Dishwasher safe
The jar has a removable lid to make cleaning easy. The jar, blades and lid are all dishwasher safe

Durable Stainless Steel Blades
Durable stainless steel blades stay sharp and free from rust or tarnishing for longer.

1 Speed + Pulse Settings to Choose From
Produce a wide range of drinks and enable fast ingredient preparation for your favourite meals with 1 speed and Pulse settings to choose from. Use for ingredients from herbs, spices and veggies, to grinding coffee, and even crushing ice to make a delicious chilled smoothie.

Large Jar Perfectly Sized for Your Family's Needs
Serves up to 5 drinks (based on 200ml glass size) thanks to 1L effective capacity.***

Download The NutriU App for Healthy, Tasty Family Favourites
Download and discover the NutriU app with +200 ideas on how to make your favourite drinks, meals and snacks with the help of your new blender. Healthy cooking should be simple and leave your family wanting more. That is why the NutriU app offers a variety of healthy alternatives of your favourite dishes. From healthy chocolate desserts to nutrient-packed main meals, we create our recipes healthy but without compromising on delicious taste.

MTP Sensor Prevents Motor Overheating
Special Motor Thermo Protection (MTP) sensor is designed to prevent the motor from overheating and protects from over-current condition during use.

Ergonomic and Robust Design for Ease of Use
The design has been carefully considered to be both ergonomic and robust, while also being modern and stylish, sized to fit in all types of kitchens. The jar shape is comfortable to grip and the rotary knob enables easy operation.

Suction Feet for No Vibrations During Use
The blender features suction feet for stability and to ensure it doesn’t vibrate during use.

2-Year Warranty
For additional peace of mind, the blender comes with a 2-year warranty.
short_description:
Features:
• ProBlend system

• 1.9L Maximum Capacity

• 1L Effective capacity

• 1 Speed setting + pulse

• Plastic Jar

name: Philips L'Or Barista LM8014/60 Capsule Coffee Machine with Milk Frother | Black
description:
Description

Customise your Coffee with Adjustable Levels
The Philips L'OR Barista Capsule Coffee Machine doubles your coffee pleasure by brewing two espressos at once or a double in one cup with an exclusive system.

Compatible with L'OR Espresso and L'OR Barista Capsules
L'OR Barista coffee machine is designed to work with the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules and L'OR Espresso single shot capsules.

Brew 2 Coffees at Once or 1 Double Coffee in a Single Cup
L'OR Barista System allows you to brew two cups of espresso or a double espresso in a single cup thanks to the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules. Enjoy ristretto for two or double espresso just for you.

Up to 19 bars of Pressure for Perfect Espresso
Savour the taste of true espresso. L'OR Barista System brews coffee at high pressure, up to 19 bars, to ensure true espresso quality.

Adjustable Coffee Volumes from 25ml to 220ml
Brew your favourite coffee drinks with L'OR Barista System - Enjoy a ristretto, espresso, lungo and more with L'OR Espresso single shot capsules or double your pleasure thanks to the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules.

Prepare Milk-Based Coffee Recipes
The Milk Frother provides the freedom to enjoy a variety of hot and cold milk-based coffee recipes at home. Every coffee that you prepare will be topped with a silky and smooth milk froth layer.

Craft and Customise your Favourite Coffee
The machine drip tray can easily be adjusted to fit your large mug or latte macchiato glass. Simply remove the larger drip tray and enjoy your long coffee mug.

Dual Capsule Recognition Automatically Detects Capsule Size
L'OR Barista Smart Dual Capsule Recognition Technology automatically detects the capsule size and adjusts to the optimal coffee setting for each coffee recipe.

Assortment of 9 Capsules Included in the Box
Every appliance comes with a variety assortment of capsules: 4 L'OR Espresso single shot and 5 L'OR Barista double shot capsules.

Compatible with L'OR Espresso and L'OR Barista Capsules
Brew the new exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules.

Full coffee Menu: Ristretto, Espresso, Lungo and More
Ristretto for 2 or double espresso for you.
short_description:
Features:
• Brew two coffees at once with the L'OR Barista
• High-pressure brewing to ensure quality
• Milk frother included
• Removable tray for extra options
• Full coffee menu to adapt to whatever you want
• Black – Piano Noir

name: Philips L'Or Barista LM9012/00 Sublime Capsule Coffee Machine | Satin White
description:
Description

Infinite Creations, Infinite Pleasure
Discover the new L'OR Barista Sublime coffee machine with volume personalisation. Brew two single espressos at once or a double espresso in one cup with the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot system.

Compatible with L'OR Espresso and L'OR Barista Capsules
L'OR Barista coffee machine is designed to work with the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules and L'OR Espresso single shot capsules.

Brew 2 Coffees at Once or 1 Double Coffee in a Single Cup
L'OR Barista System allows you to brew two cups of espresso or a double espresso in a single cup thanks to the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules. Enjoy ristretto for two or double espresso just for you.

Personalise your Coffee Volumes from 20ml to 270ml
Easily adjust the coffee length of your beverage to your taste preference and enjoy your perfect cup of coffee.

Adjustable Drip Tray for Cups of Different Sizes
The machine drip tray can easily be adjusted to fit your large mug or latte macchiato glass. Simply remove the larger drip tray and enjoy your long coffee mug.

Up to 19 Bars of Pressure for Perfect Espresso
Savour the taste of true espresso. L'OR Barista System brews coffee at high pressure, up to 19 bars, to ensure true espresso quality.

Dual Capsule Recognition Automatically Detects Capsule Size
L'OR Barista Smart Dual Capsule Recognition Technology automatically detects the capsule size and adjusts to the optimal coffee setting for each coffee recipe.

Assortment of 9 Capsules Included in the Box
Every appliance comes with a variety assortment of capsules: 4 L'OR Espresso single shot and 5 L'OR Barista double shot capsules.

Compatibility
L'OR BARISTA® Sublime is compatible with L'OR classic espresso capsules and L'OR BARISTA® XXL capsules (to prepare a double espresso or 2 espressos simultaneously). You can also use Nespresso®* capsules, other compatible capsules, and most supermarket brands.


Adjustable Coffee volumes from 25ml to 270ml
Brew your favourite coffee drinks with L'OR Barista System - Enjoy a ristretto, espresso, lungo and more with L'OR Espresso single shot capsules or double your pleasure thanks to the exclusive L'OR Barista double shot capsules.

name: Philips L'OR BARISTA LM9512/00 Absolu Capsule Coffee Machine | Satin White
description:
Description

L'OR BARISTA Absolu Capsule Coffee Machine 
Awaken your senses with the new L'OR Barista Absolu coffee machine. Indulge in trusted hot coffee recipes and discover refreshing, chilled creations with the Enjoy Over Ice functionality. Its sleek, adaptable design with a movable water tank fits seamlessly and elegantly into any kitchen.

19 Bar Barista Coffee System
The L’OR Barista system brews coffee at high pressure, ensuring that every cup is rich and full-bodied, so that you can savour true espresso quality and taste.

Enjoy Over Ice
Cool down with a refreshing iced coffee. Fill your cup with ice and let the Enjoy Over Ice functionality brew the coffee at a lower temperature, ensuring a smooth taste and a thick velvety crema for your iced creation.

Intensity Boost
Take your coffee to the next level with Intensity Boost. Unlock richer aromas and flavours with just a touch.

Movable Water Tank
The movable 1.2 L water tank adjusts effortlessly, with 3 positions to fit any kitchen, combining functional practicality with elegant design.

Adjustable Drip Tray
From tall mugs to petite espresso glasses, the adjustable drip tray adapts to your needs. Simply remove the drip tray for taller serves and adjust its height for shorter ones.

Dual Capsule Reco Auto Detects Cap Size
L'OR BARISTA Dual Capsule Recognition technology automatically detects the capsule size and automatically switches to the optimal coffee setting.

Fast Heat-Up Time
With the rapid 25 second heat-up feature, you'll never have to wait long for your moment of delicious coffee.

10 Coffee Capsules Included in the Box
Every appliance comes with a free 10 coffee capsules, inviting you to begin your L’OR coffee journey of discovery today.

Endless Coffee Possibilities
Step into the versatile coffee menu of L'OR Barista and choose from over 30 L'OR coffee blends. Explore ristrettos, espressos and lungos with L'OR Espresso single shot capsules, or double your pleasure by brewing an extra-large mug with the exclusive L'OR Barista XXL capsules.

Exclusive L'OR Barista XXL Capsules
Create two cups at once or an extra-large mug with the exclusive L'OR Barista XXL capsules.

Smart Maintenance
The descaling light takes the guesswork out of upkeep, signalling when it's time to descale your machine for optimal performance.

Spacious Capsule Bin
The capsule bin holds up to 13 espresso capsules, minimising clean up interruptions.

A+ Energy Efficiency
The L'OR Barista auto-shutoff feature balances indulgence with sustainability.

Trusted Quality
The L'OR Barista Absolu coffee machine is made by Philips, a brand renowned for innovation and excellence in kitchen appliances. It comes with a 2 year warranty, so you can enjoy coffee with confidence from a machine built to last.
short_description:
Features:
• 18 coffee creations, hot and iced. Endless coffee pleasure
• Enjoy over ice functionality for up to 6 different iced coffee recipes
• Intensity boost functionality for a bolder, more intense taste
• Dual capsule recognition for optimal coffee setting to brew different sizes of coffee
• Movable water tank for a perfect fit in any kitchen
• FREE – Judge Duo JDG68, 2 Piece Cappuccino Glass Set with every purchase of L’OR coffee machine.
